title: BRIDG-Q: Barren-Plateau-Resilient Initialisation with Data-Aware LLM-Generated Quantum Circuits
authors: Ngoc Nhi Nguyen, Thai T Vu, John Le, Hoa Khanh Dam, Dung Hoang Duong, Dinh Thai Hoang
abstract: Quantum circuit initialisation is a key bottleneck in variational quantum algorithms (VQAs), strongly impacting optimisation stability and convergence. Recent work shows that large language models (LLMs) can synthesise high-quality variational circuit architectures, but their continuous parameter predictions are unreliable. Conversely, data-driven initialisation methods such as BEINIT improve trainability via problem-adaptive priors, yet assume fixed ansatz templates and ignore generative circuit structure. We propose BRIDG-Q (Barren-Plateau-Resilient Initialisation with Data-Aware LLM-Generated Quantum Circuits), a neuro-symbolic pipeline that bridges this gap by coupling LLM-generated circuit architectures with empirical-Bayes parameter initialisation. BRIDG-Q uses AgentQ to generate problem-conditioned circuit topologies, removes generated parameters, and injects data-informed parameter initialisations to mitigate barren plateau effects. Evaluations on graph optimisation benchmarks using residual energy gap and convergence metrics show improved optimisation robustness, indicating that data-driven initialisation remains effective even for LLM-generated circuits, with oracle per-instance selection achieving approximately a 10% reduction in final residual energy.
title_zh: BRIDG-Q：具有数据感知的LLM生成量子电路的抗荒漠化初始化
abstract_zh: 量子电路初始化是变分量子算法（VQAs）中的一个关键瓶颈，对优化的稳定性与收敛性具有显著影响。近期研究显示，大型语言模型（LLMs）能够生成高质量的变分电路架构，但其连续参数预测结果往往不可靠。相反，基于数据的初始化方法如BEINIT通过问题自适应先验提升了电路的可训练性，但这类方法通常假设变分模板固定，忽略了生成式电路结构的设计。我们提出BRIDG-Q（抗平庸高原的、数据感知的LLM生成量子电路初始化方法），这是一种神经符号化流程，通过将LLM生成的电路架构与经验贝叶斯参数初始化相结合，弥合了上述差距。BRIDG-Q利用AgentQ生成与问题相关的电路拓扑结构，移除原始生成的参数，并注入基于数据的信息来初始化参数，从而有效缓解平庸高原问题。在图优化基准测试中，通过残差能量间隙和收敛性指标评估表明，该方法显著提升了优化鲁棒性，说明即使对于LLM生成的电路，数据驱动的初始化依然有效；而采用Oracle逐实例选择策略，最终残差能量可降低约10%。

title: Policy-Guided Threat Hunting: An LLM enabled Framework with Splunk SOC Triage
authors: Rishikesh Sahay, Bell Eapen, Weizhi Meng, Md Rasel Al Mamun, Nikhil Kumar Dora, Manjusha Sumasadan, Sumit Kumar Tetarave, Rod Soto
abstract: With frequently evolving Advanced Persistent Threats (APTs) in cyberspace, traditional security solutions approaches have become inadequate for threat hunting for organizations. Moreover, SOC (Security Operation Centers) analysts are often overwhelmed and struggle to analyze the huge volume of logs received from diverse devices in organizations. To address these challenges, we propose an automated and dynamic threat hunting framework for monitoring evolving threats, adapting to changing network conditions, and performing risk-based prioritization for the mitigation of suspicious and malicious traffic. By integrating Agentic AI with Splunk, an established SIEM platform, we developed a unique threat hunting framework. The framework systematically and seamlessly integrates different threat hunting modules together, ranging from traffic ingestion to anomaly assessment using a reconstruction-based autoencoder, deep reinforcement learning (DRL) with two layers for initial triage, and a large language model (LLM) for contextual analysis. We evaluated the framework against a publicly available benchmark dataset, as well as against a simulated dataset. The experimental results show that the framework can effectively adapt to different SOC objectives autonomously and identify suspicious and malicious traffic. The framework enhances operational effectiveness by supporting SOC analysts in their decision-making to block, allow, or monitor network traffic. This study thus enhances cybersecurity and threat hunting literature by presenting the novel threat hunting framework for security decision- making, as well as promoting cumulative research efforts to develop more effective frameworks to battle continuously evolving cyber threats.
title_zh: 策略引导的威胁狩猎：一种基于大语言模型的Splunk SOC分析框架
abstract_zh: 随着网络空间中高级持续性威胁（APTs）的不断演变，传统的安全解决方案在威胁狩猎方面已显得力不从心。此外，安全运营中心（SOC）分析师常常面临海量日志数据的压力，这些日志来自组织内各种不同的设备，难以高效分析。为应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种自动化且动态的威胁狩猎框架，旨在实时监控不断演化的威胁，适应网络环境的变化，并基于风险对可疑和恶意流量进行优先级排序，以实现有效缓解。通过将代理型人工智能（Agentic AI）与成熟的SIEM平台Splunk相结合，我们构建了一个独特的威胁狩猎框架。该框架系统化、无缝地整合了多个威胁狩猎模块，涵盖从流量采集、基于重构的自编码器的异常评估，到采用双层深度强化学习（DRL）进行初步筛选，以及利用大语言模型（LLM）进行上下文分析等环节。我们在公开可用的基准数据集及模拟数据集上对该框架进行了评估，实验结果表明，该框架能够自主适应不同的SOC目标，并有效识别出可疑及恶意流量。该框架通过支持SOC分析师在阻断、放行或监控网络流量方面的决策，显著提升了运营效率。本研究不仅为安全决策提供了新颖的威胁狩猎框架，还推动了累积性的科研努力，致力于开发更有效的框架以应对持续演进的网络威胁，从而丰富了网络安全与威胁狩猎领域的理论与实践。

title: HDPO: Hybrid Distillation Policy Optimization via Privileged Self-Distillation
authors: Ken Ding
abstract: Large language models trained with reinforcement learning (RL) for mathematical reasoning face a fundamental challenge: on problems the model cannot solve at all - "cliff" prompts - the RL gradient vanishes entirely, preventing any learning signal from reaching these failure modes. We introduce Hybrid Distillation Policy Optimization (HDPO), which augments standard RL with privileged self-distillation targeting cliff prompts. On each training step, HDPO identifies prompts where all rollouts fail, generates privileged rollouts by providing the model with ground-truth information, filters for correct solutions, and distills the teacher's token-level distribution into the student. Because teacher and student share the same weights - differing only in their input - the realizability gap is provably bounded, unlike cross-model distillation. We prove that R=1 filtered privileged generation recovers the optimal KL-regularized RL policy in the hard-threshold limit. Experiments on OpenMathInstruct-2 with Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B-Instruct show that HDPO consistently improves coverage metrics (pass@4 by +0.8-1.1%, pass@8 by +0.4-1.7%) while maintaining greedy accuracy, with the distillation weight lambda providing direct control over the exploration-exploitation tradeoff.
title_zh: HDPO：通过特权自蒸馏的混合蒸馏策略优化
abstract_zh: 通过强化学习（RL）训练的大语言模型在数学推理任务中面临一个根本性挑战：对于模型完全无法解决的问题——即“悬崖”提示（"cliff" prompts）——强化学习的梯度会完全消失，导致这些失败模式无法获得任何学习信号。我们提出了**混合蒸馏策略优化**（Hybrid Distillation Policy Optimization, HDPO），该方法在标准强化学习基础上引入了针对“悬崖”提示的特权自蒸馏机制。在每一步训练中，HDPO 会识别出所有采样路径均失败的提示，通过向模型提供真实答案信息生成“特权”采样路径，筛选出正确解，并将教师模型的逐标记分布蒸馏到学生模型中。由于教师与学生共享相同的模型权重（仅输入不同），其可实现性差距被严格限定，这与跨模型蒸馏存在本质区别。我们证明，在硬阈值极限下，采用 R=1 的过滤式特权生成能够恢复最优的 KL 正则化强化学习策略。在 OpenMathInstruct-2 数据集上使用 Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B-Instruct 模型的实验表明，HDPO 在保持贪婪准确率的同时，持续提升了覆盖率指标（pass@4 提升 0.8–1.1%，pass@8 提升 0.4–1.7%），且蒸馏权重 λ 可直接调控探索与利用之间的权衡。

title: Boosting LLMs for Mutation Generation
authors: Bo Wang, Ming Deng, Mingda Chen, Chengran Yang, Youfang Lin, Mark Harman, Mike Papadakis, Jie M. Zhang
abstract: LLM-based mutation testing is a promising testing technology, but existing approaches typically rely on a fixed set of mutations as few-shot examples or none at all. This can result in generic low-quality mutations, missed context-specific mutation patterns, substantial numbers of redundant and uncompilable mutants, and limited semantic similarity to real bugs. To overcome these limitations, we introduce SMART (Semantic Mutation with Adaptive Retrieval and Tuning). SMART integrates retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) on a vectorized dataset of real-world bugs, focused code chunking, and supervised fine-tuning using mutations coupled with real-world bugs. We conducted an extensive empirical study of SMART using 1,991 real-world Java bugs from the Defects4J and ConDefects datasets, comparing SMART to the state-of-the-art LLM-based approaches, LLMut and LLMorpheus. The results reveal that SMART substantially improves mutation validity, effectiveness, and efficiency (even enabling small-scale 7B-scale models to match or even surpass large models like GPT-4o). We also demonstrate that SMART significantly improves downstream software engineering applications, including test case prioritization and fault localization. More specifically, SMART improves validity (weighted average generation rate) from 42.89% to 65.6%. It raises the non-duplicate rate from 87.38% to 95.62%, and the compilable rate from 88.85% to 90.21%. In terms of effectiveness, it achieves a real bug detection rate of 92.61% (vs. 57.86% for LLMut) and improves the average Ochiai coefficient from 25.61% to 38.44%. For fault localization, SMART ranks 64 more bugs as Top-1 under MUSE and 57 more under Metallaxis.
title_zh: 提升大语言模型在突变生成中的应用
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的变异测试是一种有前景的测试技术，但现有方法通常依赖于固定的一组变异作为少样本示例，甚至完全不使用示例。这可能导致生成的变异普遍质量较低、遗漏特定上下文中的变异模式、产生大量冗余且无法编译的变异体，以及与真实缺陷在语义上相似度不足等问题。为克服这些局限性，我们提出了SMART（语义自适应检索与调优的变异生成方法）。SMART结合了向量化的实际缺陷数据集上的检索增强生成（RAG）、聚焦代码片段切分，以及利用真实缺陷与对应变异进行监督微调的技术。我们在Defects4J和ConDefects数据集中的1,991个真实Java缺陷上进行了大规模实证研究，将SMART与当前最先进的LLM-based方法LLMut和LLMorpheus进行了对比。结果表明，SMART显著提升了变异的有效性、效率和效果（甚至使小型7B规模模型达到或超越GPT-4o等大型模型的表现）。此外，我们还证明了SMART能显著提升下游软件工程应用的效果，包括测试用例优先级排序和故障定位。具体而言，SMART将变异生成的有效性（加权平均生成率）从42.89%提升至65.6%；非重复率从87.38%提高到95.62%，可编译率从88.85%提升至90.21%。在有效性方面，其真实缺陷检测率达到92.61%（相较LLMut的57.86%大幅提升），平均Ochiai系数由25.61%提升至38.44%。在故障定位任务中，SMART在MUSE指标下使64个缺陷被排进Top-1，在Metallaxis指标下则多定位57个缺陷。

title: AI-Supervisor: Autonomous AI Research Supervision via a Persistent Research World Model
authors: Yunbo Long
abstract: Existing automated research systems operate as stateless, linear pipelines, generating outputs without maintaining a persistent understanding of the research landscape. They process papers sequentially, propose ideas without structured gap analysis, and lack mechanisms for agents to verify or refine each other's findings. We present AutoProf (Autonomous Professor), a multi-agent orchestration framework where specialized agents provide end-to-end AI research supervision driven by human interests, from literature review through gap discovery, method development, evaluation, and paper writing, via autonomous exploration and self-correcting updates. Unlike sequential pipelines, AutoProf maintains a continuously evolving Research World Model implemented as a Knowledge Graph, capturing methods, benchmarks, limitations, and unexplored gaps as shared memory across agents. The framework introduces three contributions: first, structured gap discovery that decomposes methods into modules, evaluates them across benchmarks, and identifies module-level gaps; second, self-correcting discovery loops that analyze why modules succeed or fail, detect benchmark biases, and assess evaluation adequacy; third, self-improving development loops using cross-domain mechanism search to iteratively address failing components. All agents operate under a consensus mechanism where findings are validated before being committed to the shared model. The framework is model-agnostic, supports mainstream large language models, and scales elastically with token budget from lightweight exploration to full-scale investigation.
title_zh: AI主管：通过持续的研究世界模型实现自主AI研究监督
abstract_zh:
现有的自动化研究系统通常作为无状态、线性的处理流程运行，生成输出时无法持续理解研究领域的整体格局。它们按顺序处理论文，提出想法却缺乏结构化的差距分析，且缺少智能体之间相互验证或优化彼此发现的机制。我们提出了AutoProf（自主教授）——一种多智能体协同框架，通过自主探索与自我修正更新，实现从文献综述、研究空白发现、方法开发、评估到论文撰写的全流程AI研究监督，全程以人类的研究兴趣为导向。

与传统的线性流水线不同，AutoProf维护一个持续演进的“研究世界模型”，该模型以知识图谱的形式构建，将方法、基准测试、局限性以及未探索的研究空白作为共享记忆在各智能体间流通。本框架提出三项核心贡献：第一，结构化研究空白发现机制，将方法分解为可评估的模块，在多个基准上进行性能分析，并识别出模块层面的不足；第二，自我修正的发现循环，能够分析模块成功或失败的原因，检测基准数据中的偏见，并评估评价体系的充分性；第三，自我提升的方法开发循环，通过跨领域机制搜索，迭代修复表现不佳的组件。

所有智能体均在共识机制下协作，任何发现必须经过验证后方可写入共享模型。该框架具有模型无关性，兼容主流大语言模型，并可根据token预算弹性扩展，从轻量级探索到全规模研究调查均可胜任。

title: The Specification Gap: Coordination Failure Under Partial Knowledge in Code Agents
authors: Camilo Chacón Sartori
abstract: When multiple LLM-based code agents independently implement parts of the same class, they must agree on shared internal representations, even when the specification leaves those choices implicit. We study this coordination problem across 51 class-generation tasks, progressively stripping specification detail from full docstrings (L0) to bare signatures (L3), and introducing opposing structural biases (lists vs. dictionaries) to stress-test integration. Three findings emerge. First, a persistent specification gap: two-agent integration accuracy drops from 58% to 25% as detail is removed, while a single-agent baseline degrades more gracefully (89% to 56%), leaving a 25--39 pp coordination gap that is consistent across two Claude models (Sonnet, Haiku) and three independent runs. Second, an AST-based conflict detector achieves 97% precision at the weakest specification level without additional LLM calls, yet a factorial recovery experiment shows that restoring the full specification alone recovers the single-agent ceiling (89%), while providing conflict reports adds no measurable benefit. Third, decomposing the gap into coordination cost (+16 pp) and information asymmetry (+11 pp) suggests that the two effects are independent and approximately additive. The gap is not merely a consequence of hidden information, but reflects the difficulty of producing compatible code without shared decisions. These results support a specification-first view of multi-agent code generation: richer specifications are both the primary coordination mechanism and the sufficient recovery instrument.
title_zh: 规范差距：代码代理在部分知识下的协调失败
abstract_zh:
当多个基于大语言模型（LLM）的代码代理独立实现同一类的不同部分时，即使规范中未明确说明，它们也必须就共享的内部表示达成一致。我们针对51个类生成任务研究了这一协调问题，逐步从完整的文档字符串（L0）精简至仅含函数签名（L3），并引入对立的结构偏见（列表 vs. 字典）以测试集成的鲁棒性。研究得出三个核心发现：

第一，持续存在的规范差距：随着规范细节的减少，双代理集成准确率从58%下降至25%，而单代理基线则更平稳地从89%降至56%，由此产生的25–39个百分点的协调差距在两个Claude模型（Sonnet、Haiku）及三次独立实验中均保持一致。

第二，在最弱规范层级下，基于抽象语法树（AST）的冲突检测器无需额外调用LLM即可达到97%的精确率；然而，因子式恢复实验表明，仅恢复完整规范即可使性能回升至单代理上限（89%），而提供冲突报告并未带来可测量的改进。

第三，将该差距分解为协调成本（+16个百分点）与信息不对称（+11个百分点）后发现，两者相互独立且近似可加。这表明该差距并非单纯由隐含信息导致，而是反映出在缺乏共同决策的情况下生成兼容代码本身的困难。

这些结果支持一种“先规范”的多代理代码生成范式：更丰富的规范不仅是主要的协调机制，也是实现充分恢复的关键工具。

title: Environment-Grounded Multi-Agent Workflow for Autonomous Penetration Testing
authors: Michael Somma, Markus Großpointner, Paul Zabalegui, Eppu Heilimo, Branka Stojanović
abstract: The increasing complexity and interconnectivity of digital infrastructures make scalable and reliable security assessment methods essential. Robotic systems represent a particularly important class of operational technology, as modern robots are highly networked cyber-physical systems deployed in domains such as industrial automation, logistics, and autonomous services. This paper explores the use of large language models for automated penetration testing in robotic environments. We propose an environment-grounded multi-agent architecture tailored to Robotics-based systems. The approach dynamically constructs a shared graph-based memory during execution that captures the observable system state, including network topology, communication channels, vulnerabilities, and attempted exploits. This enables structured automation while maintaining traceability and effective context management throughout the testing process. Evaluated across multiple iterations within a specialized robotics Capture-the-Flag scenario (ROS/ROS2), the system demonstrated high reliability, successfully completing the challenge in 100\% of test runs (n=5). This performance significantly exceeds literature benchmarks while maintaining the traceability and human oversight required by frameworks like the EU AI Act.
title_zh: 基于环境的多智能体渗透测试工作流
abstract_zh: 日益复杂的数字基础设施及其高度互联的特性，使得可扩展且可靠的网络安全评估方法变得至关重要。机器人系统作为一类特别重要的运营技术，其重要性尤为突出：现代机器人是高度网络化的信息物理系统，广泛部署于工业自动化、物流及自主服务等领域。本文探讨了利用大语言模型在机器人环境中实现自动化渗透测试的应用。我们提出了一种面向机器人系统的环境感知型多智能体架构。该方法在执行过程中动态构建一个基于图结构的共享记忆系统，以捕捉可观测的系统状态，包括网络拓扑、通信通道、已知漏洞以及尝试的攻击行为。这一机制实现了结构化自动化，同时在整个测试过程中保持了可追溯性与有效的上下文管理能力。在专门设计的机器人夺旗赛（ROS/ROS2）场景中进行多轮评估，系统在全部5次测试运行中均成功完成挑战，达成100%的成功率。该表现显著优于现有文献中的基准水平，同时满足欧盟《人工智能法案》等框架所要求的可追溯性与人工监督标准。

title: APISENSOR: Robust Discovery of Web API from Runtime Traffic Logs
authors: Yanjing Yang, Chenxing Zhong, Ke Han, Zeru Cheng, Jinwei Xu, Xin Zhou, He Zhang, Bohan Liu
abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents increasingly rely on APIs to operate complex web applications, but rapid evolution often leads to incomplete or inconsistent API documentation. Existing work falls into two categories: (1) static, white-box approaches based on source code or formal specifications, and (2) dynamic, black-box approaches that infer APIs from runtime traffic. Static approaches rely on internal artifacts, which are typically unavailable for closed-source systems, and often over-approximate API usage, resulting in high false-positive rates. Although dynamic black-box API discovery applies broadly, its robustness degrades in complex environments where shared collection points aggregate traffic from multiple applications. To improve robustness under mixed runtime traffic, we propose APISENSOR, a black-box API discovery framework that reconstructs application APIs unsupervised. APISENSOR performs structured analysis over complex traffic, combining traffic denoising and normalization with a graph-based two-stage clustering process to recover accurate APIs. We evaluated APISENSOR across six web applications using over 10,000 runtime requests with simulated mixed-traffic noise. Results demonstrate that APISENSOR significantly improves discovery accuracy, achieving an average Group Accuracy Precision of 95.92% and an F1-score of 94.91%, outperforming state-of-the-art methods. Across different applications and noise settings, APISENSOR achieves the lowest performance variance and at most an 8.11-point FGA drop, demonstrating the best robustness among 10 baselines. Ablation studies confirm that each component is essential. Furthermore, APISENSOR revealed API documentation inconsistencies in a real application, later confirmed by community developers.
title_zh: APISENSOR：从运行时流量日志中鲁棒地发现Web API
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体越来越多地依赖API来操作复杂的网络应用，但API的快速演进常常导致文档不完整或不一致。现有研究主要分为两类：(1) 基于源代码或形式化规范的静态白盒方法；(2) 通过运行时流量推断API的动态黑盒方法。静态方法依赖内部实现细节，通常无法应用于闭源系统，且常过度估计API使用情况，导致误报率较高。尽管动态黑盒API发现具有广泛适用性，但在复杂环境中其鲁棒性会下降，尤其是在多个应用共享同一数据采集点、流量混合的情况下。为提升在混合运行时流量下的鲁棒性，我们提出APISENSOR——一种无需监督的黑盒API发现框架，能够重建应用程序的API。APISENSOR对复杂流量进行结构化分析，结合流量去噪与归一化处理，并采用基于图的两阶段聚类过程，以恢复出准确的API。我们在六个Web应用上进行了评估，使用超过10,000条运行时请求，并引入模拟的混合流量噪声。结果表明，APISENSOR显著提升了API发现的准确性，平均组精度（Group Accuracy Precision）达到95.92%，F1分数达94.91%，优于当前最先进的方法。在不同应用和噪声设置下，APISENSOR表现出最低的性能波动，F1得分下降最多仅8.11个百分点，展现出十种基线方法中最佳的鲁棒性。消融实验进一步验证了各组件的重要性。此外，APISENSOR在真实应用中发现了API文档的不一致性，该问题随后得到了社区开发者的确认。

title: CodeExemplar: Example-Based Scaffolding for Introductory Programming in the GenAI Era
authors: Boxuan Ma, Shinichi Konomi
abstract: Generative AI (GenAI) can generate working code with minimal effort, creating a tension in introductory programming: students need timely help, yet direct solutions invite copying and can short-circuit reasoning. To address this, we propose example-based scaffolding, where GenAI provides scaffold examples that match a target task's underlying reasoning pattern but differ in contexts to support analogical transfer while reducing copying. We contribute a two-dimensional taxonomy, design guidelines, and CodeExemplar, a prototype integrated with auto-graded tasks, with initial formative feedback from a classroom pilot and instructor interviews.
title_zh: 代码范例：生成式人工智能时代入门编程中的基于示例的支架教学
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能（GenAI）能够以极小的投入生成可运行的代码，这在编程入门教学中引发了一定的矛盾：学生需要及时获得帮助，但直接提供解决方案又容易导致抄袭，甚至削弱其思维过程。为解决这一问题，我们提出基于示例的支架式教学方法，即让GenAI提供与目标任务具有相同底层推理模式但情境不同的示例，以支持类比迁移，同时降低抄袭风险。本文贡献包括一个二维分类体系、设计指南，以及一个名为CodeExemplar的原型系统，该系统已集成到自动评分任务中，并通过课堂试点和教师访谈获得了初步的形成性反馈。

title: Gendered Prompting and LLM Code Review: How Gender Cues in the Prompt Shape Code Quality and Evaluation
authors: Lynn Janzen, Üveys Eroglu, Dorothea Kolossa, Pia Knöferle, Sebastian Möller, Vera Schmitt, Veronika Solopova
abstract: LLMs are increasingly embedded in programming workflows, from code generation to automated code review. Yet, how gendered communication styles interact with LLM-assisted programming and code review remains underexplored. We present a mixed-methods pilot study examining whether gender-related linguistic differences in prompts influence code generation outcomes and code review decisions. Across three complementary studies, we analyze (i) collected real-world coding prompts, (ii) a controlled user study, in which developers solve identical programming tasks with LLM assistance, and (iii) an LLM-based simulated evaluation framework that systematically varies gender-coded prompt styles and reviewer personas. We find that gender-related differences in prompting style are subtle but measurable, with female-authored prompts exhibiting more indirect and involved language, which does not translate into consistent gaps in functional correctness or static code quality. For LLM code review, in contrast, we observe systematic biases: on average, models approve female-authored code more, despite comparable quality. Controlled experiments show that gender-coded prompt style affect code length and maintainability, while reviewer behavior varies across models. Our findings suggest that fairness risks in LLM-assisted programming arise less from generation accuracy than from LLM evaluation, as LLMs are increasingly deployed as automated code reviewers.
title_zh: 性别提示与大语言模型代码审查：提示中的性别线索如何影响代码质量和评估
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正越来越多地融入编程工作流程，从代码生成到自动化代码审查。然而，性别化沟通风格如何与基于LLM的编程及代码审查相互作用，仍是一个研究不足的领域。本文通过一项混合方法的初步研究，探讨了与性别相关的提示语差异是否会影响代码生成结果和代码审查决策。本研究包含三个互补的子研究：（i）分析真实世界中的编程提示数据；（ii）一项受控用户实验，开发者在LLM辅助下完成相同的编程任务；（iii）一种基于LLM的模拟评估框架，系统性地改变具有性别特征的提示风格和评审者角色。研究发现，与性别相关的提示风格差异虽细微但可测量：女性撰写的提示更倾向于使用间接且更具参与性的语言，但这并未导致功能正确性或静态代码质量上的系统性差距。然而，在LLM代码审查方面，我们观察到明显的系统性偏见：平均而言，模型对女性作者编写的代码给予更高的通过率，尽管其代码质量相当。受控实验进一步表明，带有性别特征的提示风格会影响代码长度和可维护性，而不同模型的评审行为也存在差异。研究结果表明，在基于LLM的编程中，公平性风险更多源于LLM的评估环节，而非代码生成的准确性，因为LLM正日益被用作自动化代码审查工具。

title: Complexity of basic boolean operators for digital circuit design
authors: Igor S. Sergeev
abstract: This article provides a survey of circuit complexity bounds for basic boolean transforms exploited in digital circuit design and efficient methods for synthesizing such circuits. The exposition covers structurally simple functions and operators, such as counters, adders, encoders, and multiplexors, and excludes more complex algebraic operations with numbers, polynomials, and matrices. Several applications to implementing more specific operations are also discussed.
title_zh: 数字电路设计中基本布尔运算的复杂度
abstract_zh: 本文对数字电路设计中常用的布尔变换的电路复杂度界限进行了综述，并介绍了合成此类电路的有效方法。论述涵盖了结构简单的函数与算子，如计数器、加法器、编码器和多路选择器，而不包括更复杂的数值、多项式及矩阵代数运算。此外，文章还讨论了若干应用于实现特定操作的实例。

title: Towards Automated Crowdsourced Testing via Personified-LLM
authors: Shengcheng Yu, Yuchen Ling, Chunrong Fang, Zhenyu Chen, Chunyang Chen
abstract: The rapid proliferation and increasing complexity of software demand robust quality assurance, with graphical user interface (GUI) testing playing a pivotal role. Crowdsourced testing has proven effective in this context by leveraging the diversity of human testers to achieve rich, scenario-based coverage across varied devices, user behaviors, and usage environments. In parallel, automated testing, particularly with the advent of large language models (LLMs), offers significant advantages in controllability, reproducibility, and efficiency, enabling scalable and systematic exploration. However, automated approaches often lack the behavioral diversity characteristic of human testers, limiting their capability to fully simulate real-world testing dynamics. To address this gap, we present PersonaTester, a novel personified-LLM-based framework designed to automate crowdsourced GUI testing. By injecting representative personas, defined along three orthogonal dimensions: testing mindset, exploration strategy, and interaction habit, into LLM-based agents, PersonaTester enables the simulation of diverse human-like testing behaviors in a controllable and repeatable manner. Experimental results demonstrate that PersonaTester faithfully reproduces the behavioral patterns of real crowdworkers, exhibiting strong intra-persona consistency and clear inter-persona variability (117.86% -- 126.23% improvement over the baseline). Moreover, persona-guided testing agents consistently generate more effective test events and trigger more crashes (100+) and functional bugs (11) than the baseline without persona, thus substantially advancing the realism and effectiveness of automated crowdsourced GUI testing.
title_zh: 通过人格化大语言模型实现自动化众包测试
abstract_zh: 软件的快速普及及其日益复杂的特性，对质量保障提出了更高要求，其中图形用户界面（GUI）测试发挥着关键作用。众包测试在此背景下展现出显著优势，通过利用人类测试者的多样性，实现跨多种设备、用户行为和使用环境的丰富场景覆盖。与此同时，自动化测试，尤其是随着大语言模型（LLMs）的发展，也展现出可控性、可重复性和高效性的巨大优势，能够实现规模化、系统化的测试探索。然而，自动化方法往往缺乏人类测试者所具备的行为多样性，难以完全模拟真实世界中的测试动态。为弥补这一差距，我们提出PersonaTester——一种基于人格化大语言模型的新型自动化众包GUI测试框架。该框架通过在基于LLM的测试代理中注入具有代表性的“测试人格”，这些人格从三个正交维度进行定义：测试心态、探索策略与交互习惯，从而实现可控且可复现的人类化测试行为模拟。实验结果表明，PersonaTester能准确还原真实众包测试人员的行为模式，表现出强内聚性的人格一致性以及清晰的人格间差异性（相比基线提升117.86%至126.23%）。此外，采用人格引导的测试代理在生成有效测试事件方面表现更优，并触发了超过100次崩溃及11个功能缺陷，显著优于无人格引导的基线方法，大幅提升了自动化众包GUI测试的真实感与有效性。

title: AnalogAgent: Self-Improving Analog Circuit Design Automation with LLM Agents
authors: Zhixuan Bao, Zhuoyi Lin, Jiageng Wang, Jinhai Hu, Yuan Gao, Yaoxin Wu, Xiaoli Li, Xun Xu
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) suggest strong potential for automating analog circuit design. Yet most LLM-based approaches rely on a single-model loop of generation, diagnosis, and correction, which favors succinct summaries over domain-specific insight and suffers from context attrition that erases critical technical details. To address these limitations, we propose AnalogAgent, a training-free agentic framework that integrates an LLM-based multi-agent system (MAS) with self-evolving memory (SEM) for analog circuit design automation. AnalogAgent coordinates a Code Generator, Design Optimizer, and Knowledge Curator to distill execution feedback into an adaptive playbook in SEM and retrieve targeted guidance for subsequent generation, enabling cross-task transfer without additional expert feedback, databases, or libraries. Across established benchmarks, AnalogAgent achieves 92% Pass@1 with Gemini and 97.4% Pass@1 with GPT-5. Moreover, with compact models (e.g., Qwen-8B), it yields a +48.8% average Pass@1 gain across tasks and reaches 72.1% Pass@1 overall, indicating that AnalogAgent substantially strengthens open-weight models for high-quality analog circuit design automation.
title_zh: 模拟代理：基于大语言模型代理的自改进模拟电路设计自动化
abstract_zh: 近年来，大型语言模型（LLMs）的进展表明其在模拟电路设计自动化方面具有巨大潜力。然而，大多数基于LLM的方法依赖于单一模型的生成、诊断与修正循环，倾向于生成简洁的摘要而非领域特定的深入见解，并且容易因上下文衰减而丢失关键的技术细节。为解决这些局限性，我们提出了AnalogAgent——一种无需训练的代理框架，该框架将基于大语言模型的多智能体系统（MAS）与自演化记忆（SEM）相结合，用于模拟电路设计自动化。AnalogAgent协调代码生成器、设计优化器和知识管理员三个智能体，将执行反馈提炼为SEM中的自适应操作手册，并在后续生成中检索针对性指导，从而实现跨任务迁移，且无需额外专家反馈、数据库或外部库支持。在多个基准测试中，AnalogAgent在Gemini模型上达到92%的Pass@1，在GPT-5上更是高达97.4% Pass@1。此外，即使使用轻量级模型（如Qwen-8B），它在各类任务上平均Pass@1提升达48.8%，整体表现达到72.1% Pass@1，表明AnalogAgent显著增强了开源权重模型在高质量模拟电路设计自动化方面的性能。

title: Understanding the Challenges in Iterative Generative Optimization with LLMs
authors: Allen Nie, Xavier Daull, Zhiyi Kuang, Abhinav Akkiraju, Anish Chaudhuri, Max Piasevoli, Ryan Rong, YuCheng Yuan, Prerit Choudhary, Shannon Xiao, Rasool Fakoor, Adith Swaminathan, Ching-An Cheng
abstract: Generative optimization uses large language models (LLMs) to iteratively improve artifacts (such as code, workflows or prompts) using execution feedback. It is a promising approach to building self-improving agents, yet in practice remains brittle: despite active research, only 9% of surveyed agents used any automated optimization. We argue that this brittleness arises because, to set up a learning loop, an engineer must make ``hidden'' design choices: What can the optimizer edit and what is the "right" learning evidence to provide at each update? We investigate three factors that affect most applications: the starting artifact, the credit horizon for execution traces, and batching trials and errors into learning evidence. Through case studies in MLAgentBench, Atari, and BigBench Extra Hard, we find that these design decisions can determine whether generative optimization succeeds, yet they are rarely made explicit in prior work. Different starting artifacts determine which solutions are reachable in MLAgentBench, truncated traces can still improve Atari agents, and larger minibatches do not monotonically improve generalization on BBEH. We conclude that the lack of a simple, universal way to set up learning loops across domains is a major hurdle for productionization and adoption. We provide practical guidance for making these choices.
title_zh: 理解基于大语言模型的迭代生成优化中的挑战
abstract_zh: 生成式优化利用大型语言模型（LLMs）通过执行反馈，迭代改进各类成果（如代码、工作流程或提示词）。这种方法为构建自我改进的智能体提供了极具前景的路径，但在实际应用中仍显得脆弱：尽管研究活跃，但调查中仅有9%的智能体采用了任何自动化优化手段。我们认为，这种脆弱性源于设置学习循环时工程师必须做出“隐含”的设计决策：优化器应修改什么内容？在每次更新时，应提供何种“正确”的学习证据？我们研究了影响大多数应用场景的三个关键因素：初始成果、执行轨迹的信用时间跨度，以及将试验与错误合并为学习证据的方式。通过对MLAgentBench、Atari和BigBench Extra Hard的案例研究，我们发现这些设计决策可能决定生成式优化是否成功，然而在以往工作中，这些选择往往未被明确说明。不同的初始成果会影响MLAgentBench中可达到的解决方案；在Atari中，即使截断的执行轨迹也能提升智能体性能；而在BBEH任务中，更大的小批量数据并不一定单调地提升泛化能力。我们得出结论：目前尚缺乏一种简单且通用的方法，可在不同领域间建立学习循环，这是推动其在生产环境中落地和广泛采用的主要障碍。为此，我们提供了实用的指导建议，帮助开发者做出这些关键决策。

title: Improving Lean4 Autoformalization via Cycle Consistency Fine-tuning
authors: Arsen Shebzukhov
abstract: Autoformalization - automatically translating natural language mathematical texts into formal proof language such as Lean4 - can help accelerate AI-assisted mathematical research, be it via proof verification or proof search. I fine-tune Qwen3.5-2B with LoRA for natural language to Lean4 formalization on FineLeanCorpus and consider three training regimes: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with curriculum learning (difficulty 1 to 10), SFT without curriculum ordering, and reinforcement learning using group relative policy optimization (GRPO) with a cycle consistency reward. Cycle consistency measures how well the meaning of a statement is preserved through a NL to Lean4 to NL' loop, computed as cosine similarity of off-the-shelf sentence embeddings. On an unseen subset of FineLeanCorpus (FLC) and on PutnamBench, RL substantially outperforms both SFT variants (mean cycle consistency 0.669 vs. 0.513 on FLC; 0.561 vs. 0.422 on PutnamBench), while increasing cross-entropy loss by only 0.011 nats, with minimal impact on formalization quality. Curriculum ordering provides no measurable benefit over shuffled training.
title_zh: 通过循环一致性微调提升Lean4自动形式化性能
abstract_zh: 自动形式化——将自然语言数学文本自动翻译为形式化证明语言（如 Lean4）——有助于加速人工智能辅助的数学研究，无论是通过证明验证还是证明搜索。我使用 LoRA 对 Qwen3.5-2B 进行微调，以实现从自然语言到 Lean4 的形式化任务，训练数据基于 FineLeanCorpus。实验设计了三种训练策略：采用课程学习（难度从 1 到 10）的监督微调（SFT）、不使用课程顺序的监督微调，以及基于组相对策略优化（GRPO）的强化学习，奖励函数采用循环一致性（cycle consistency）指标。循环一致性衡量在“自然语言 → Lean4 → 重生成自然语言”这一循环中语义保留的程度，通过现成句子嵌入的余弦相似度计算。在 FineLeanCorpus 的未见子集（FLC）和 PutnamBench 上，强化学习显著优于两种 SFT 方法（FLC 上平均循环一致性分别为 0.669 vs. 0.513；PutnamBench 上为 0.561 vs. 0.422），同时仅使交叉熵损失增加 0.011 nats，对形式化质量影响极小。相比之下，课程学习顺序并未带来可测量的性能提升，随机打乱训练已足够有效。

title: A Deep Dive into Scaling RL for Code Generation with Synthetic Data and Curricula
authors: Cansu Sancaktar, David Zhang, Gabriel Synnaeve, Taco Cohen
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for improving large language models beyond supervised fine-tuning, yet sustaining performance gains at scale remains an open challenge, as data diversity and structure, rather than volume alone, become the limiting factor. We address this by introducing a scalable multi-turn synthetic data generation pipeline in which a teacher model iteratively refines problems based on in-context student performance summaries, producing structured difficulty progressions without any teacher fine-tuning. Compared to single-turn generation, this multi-turn approach substantially improves the yield of valid synthetic problems and naturally produces stepping stones, i.e. easier and harder variants of the same core task, that support curriculum-based training. We systematically study how task difficulty, curriculum scheduling, and environment diversity interact during RL training across the Llama3.1-8B Instruct and Qwen3-8B Base model families, with additional scaling experiments on Qwen2.5-32B. Our results show that synthetic augmentation consistently improves in-domain code and in most cases out-of-domain math performance, and we provide empirical insights into how curriculum design and data diversity jointly shape RL training dynamics.
title_zh: 基于合成数据与课程学习的代码生成强化学习规模化深入研究
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）已成为在监督微调之外提升大型语言模型性能的强大范式，但如何在大规模下持续保持性能提升仍是一个开放性挑战，因为数据的多样性与结构特征，而非单纯的数据量，正逐渐成为主要瓶颈。为此，我们提出了一种可扩展的多轮合成数据生成流水线：通过教师模型根据上下文中的学生模型表现摘要，迭代优化问题，从而在无需对教师模型进行微调的情况下，生成具有结构化难度递进的合成数据。相较于单轮生成，该多轮方法显著提升了有效合成问题的产出率，并自然地生成了“阶梯式”问题——即同一核心任务的较易与较难变体，为基于课程的学习提供了支持。我们系统研究了在 Llama3.1-8B Instruct 和 Qwen3-8B Base 模型系列中，任务难度、课程调度策略与环境多样性在强化学习训练过程中的相互作用，并进一步在 Qwen2.5-32B 上进行了扩展规模实验。结果表明，合成数据增强在域内代码任务上始终带来性能提升，在大多数情况下也显著改善了跨域数学任务的表现。同时，我们提供了关于课程设计与数据多样性如何共同影响强化学习训练动态的实证洞察。

title: TsetlinWiSARD: On-Chip Training of Weightless Neural Networks using Tsetlin Automata on FPGAs
authors: Shengyu Duan, Marcos L. L. Sartori, Rishad Shafik, Alex Yakovlev
abstract: Increasing demands for adaptability, privacy, and security at the edge have persistently pushed the frontiers for a new generation of machine learning (ML) algorithms with training and inference capabilities on-chip. Weightless Neural Network (WNN) is such an algorithm that is principled on lookup table based simple neuron structures. As a result, it offers architectural benefits, such as low-latency, low-complexity inference, compared to deep neural networks that depend heavily on multiply-accumulate operations. However, traditional WNNs rely on memorization-based one-shot training, which either leads to overfitting and reduced accuracy or requires tedious post-training adjustments, limiting their effectiveness for efficient on chip training. In this work, we propose TsetlinWiSARD, a training approach for WNNs that leverages Tsetlin Automata (TAs) to enable probabilistic, feedback-driven learning. It overcomes the overfitting of WiSARD's one-shot training with iterative optimization, while maintaining simple, continuous binary feedback for efficient on-chip training. Central to our approach is a field programmable gate array (FPGA)-based training architecture that delivers state-of-the-art accuracy while significantly improving hardware efficiency. Our approach provides over 1000x faster training when compared with the traditional WiSARD implementation of WNNs. Further, we demonstrate 22% reduced resource usage, 93.3% lower latency, and 64.2% lower power consumption compared to FPGA-based training accelerators implementing other ML algorithms.
title_zh: TsetlinWiSARD：基于FPGA上Tsetlin自动机的无权重神经网络片上训练
abstract_zh: 对边缘计算中适应性、隐私性和安全性的日益增长的需求，持续推动着新一代机器学习（ML）算法的发展，这些算法能够在芯片上实现训练和推理。权重无关神经网络（WNN）正是这样一种算法，其原理基于基于查找表的简单神经元结构。因此，与依赖大量乘加运算的深度神经网络相比，WNN在架构上具有低延迟、低复杂度推理的优势。然而，传统的WNN采用基于记忆的一次性训练方法，这要么导致过拟合和准确率下降，要么需要繁琐的训练后调整，从而限制了其在高效芯片内训练中的应用效果。在本研究中，我们提出了一种名为TsetlinWiSARD的WNN训练方法，该方法利用Tsetlin自动机（TAs）实现概率性、反馈驱动的学习。该方法通过迭代优化克服了WiSARD一次性训练中的过拟合问题，同时保持了简单且连续的二进制反馈机制，从而实现了高效的芯片内训练。我们方法的核心是一个基于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的训练架构，该架构在实现业界领先准确率的同时，显著提升了硬件效率。与传统WiSARD实现的WNN相比，我们的方法训练速度提升超过1000倍。此外，与采用其他机器学习算法的FPGA训练加速器相比，我们的方案还实现了22%的资源使用减少、93.3%的延迟降低以及64.2%的功耗下降。

title: KCLNet: Electrically Equivalence-Oriented Graph Representation Learning for Analog Circuits
authors: Peng Xu, Yapeng Li, Tinghuan Chen, Tsung-Yi Ho, Bei Yu
abstract: Digital circuits representation learning has made remarkable progress in the electronic design automation domain, effectively supporting critical tasks such as testability analysis and logic reasoning. However, representation learning for analog circuits remains challenging due to their continuous electrical characteristics compared to the discrete states of digital circuits. This paper presents a direct current (DC) electrically equivalent-oriented analog representation learning framework, named \textbf{KCLNet}. It comprises an asynchronous graph neural network structure with electrically-simulated message passing and a representation learning method inspired by Kirchhoff's Current Law (KCL). This method maintains the orderliness of the circuit embedding space by enforcing the equality of the sum of outgoing and incoming current embeddings at each depth, which significantly enhances the generalization ability of circuit embeddings. KCLNet offers a novel and effective solution for analog circuit representation learning with electrical constraints preserved. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves significant performance in a variety of downstream tasks, e.g., analog circuit classification, subcircuit detection, and circuit edit distance prediction.
title_zh: KCLNet：面向模拟电路的电学等效性图表示学习
abstract_zh: 数字电路表征学习在电子设计自动化领域取得了显著进展，有效支持了可测试性分析和逻辑推理等关键任务。然而，由于模拟电路具有连续的电气特性，相较于数字电路的离散状态，其表征学习仍面临巨大挑战。本文提出了一种面向直流（DC）电学等效的模拟电路表征学习框架，命名为 \textbf{KCLNet}。该框架采用异步图神经网络结构，结合电学仿真消息传递机制，并基于基尔霍夫电流定律（KCL）设计了一种表征学习方法。该方法通过强制每个深度上流出与流入电流嵌入之和相等，保持了电路嵌入空间的有序性，显著提升了电路嵌入的泛化能力。KCLNet 为保留电学约束的模拟电路表征学习提供了一种新颖且高效的方法。实验结果表明，该方法在多种下游任务中均表现出色，例如模拟电路分类、子电路检测以及电路编辑距离预测。

title: An Invariant Compiler for Neural ODEs in AI-Accelerated Scientific Simulation
authors: Fangzhou Yu, Yiqi Su, Ray Lee, Shenfeng Cheng, Naren Ramakrishnan
abstract: Neural ODEs are increasingly used as continuous-time models for scientific and sensor data, but unconstrained neural ODEs can drift and violate domain invariants (e.g., conservation laws), yielding physically implausible solutions. In turn, this can compound error in long-horizon prediction and surrogate simulation. Existing solutions typically aim to enforce invariance by soft penalties or other forms of regularization, which can reduce overall error but do not guarantee that trajectories will not leave the constraint manifold. We introduce the invariant compiler, a framework that enforces invariants by construction: it treats invariants as first-class types and uses an LLM-driven compilation workflow to translate a generic neural ODE specification into a structure-preserving architecture whose trajectories remain on the admissible manifold in continuous time (and up to numerical integration error in practice). This compiler view cleanly separates what must be preserved (scientific structure) from what is learned from data (dynamics within that structure). It provides a systematic design pattern for invariant-respecting neural surrogates across scientific domains.
title_zh: 用于人工智能加速科学模拟中的神经微分方程的不变量编译器
abstract_zh: 神经微分方程（Neural ODEs）正越来越多地被用作科学数据和传感器数据的连续时间模型，但未加约束的神经微分方程可能会产生漂移现象，并违反领域内的不变量（如守恒定律），导致物理上不合理的解。这会进一步在长时间预测和代理模拟中累积误差。现有的解决方案通常通过软惩罚或其它形式的正则化来强制实现不变性，虽然能降低整体误差，但无法保证轨迹不会偏离约束流形。我们提出了“不变量编译器”（invariant compiler）这一框架，通过构造方式强制实现不变性：将不变量视为一等公民类型，并利用由大语言模型（LLM）驱动的编译工作流，将通用的神经微分方程描述转换为保持结构的网络架构，使其轨迹在连续时间内始终位于允许的流形上（实际应用中仅受数值积分误差影响）。该编译器视角清晰地区分了必须保留的部分（科学结构）与从数据中学习的部分（该结构内的动力学）。它为跨科学领域的不变量尊重型神经代理模型提供了一种系统性的设计范式。

title: Language Model Planners do not Scale, but do Formalizers?
authors: Owen Jiang, Cassie Huang, Ashish Sabharwal, Li Zhang
abstract: Recent work shows overwhelming evidence that LLMs, even those trained to scale their reasoning trace, perform unsatisfactorily when solving planning problems too complex. Whether the same conclusion holds for LLM formalizers that generate solver-oriented programs remains unknown. We systematically show that LLM formalizers greatly out-scale LLM planners, some retaining perfect accuracy in the classic BlocksWorld domain with a huge state space of size up to $10^{165}$. While performance of smaller LLM formalizers degrades with problem complexity, we show that a divide-and-conquer formalizing technique can greatly improve its robustness. Finally, we introduce unraveling problems where one line of problem description realistically corresponds to exponentially many lines of formal language such as the Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL), greatly challenging LLM formalizers. We tackle this challenge by introducing a new paradigm, namely LLM-as-higher-order-formalizer, where an LLM generates a program generator. This decouples token output from the combinatorial explosion of the underlying formalization and search space.
title_zh: 语言模型规划者并不具备扩展性，但形式化能力却可以？
abstract_zh: 近期研究表明，即使经过训练以扩展其推理过程的大型语言模型（LLM），在解决过于复杂的规划问题时仍表现不佳。然而，对于那些能够生成面向求解器程序的LLM形式化工具是否也存在类似结论，目前尚不清楚。我们系统性地证明，LLM形式化工具的表现远超LLM规划器，其中某些模型在经典积木世界（BlocksWorld）领域中，即便面对规模高达 $10^{165}$ 的巨大状态空间，仍能保持完美的准确率。尽管较小的LLM形式化工具在问题复杂度增加时性能会下降，但我们发现一种“分而治之”的形式化技术可显著提升其鲁棒性。最后，我们提出了“展开问题”（unraveling problems），其中仅一行问题描述就可能对应着形式语言（如规划领域定义语言PDDL）中指数级数量的行数，对LLM形式化工具构成极大挑战。为此，我们引入了一种新范式——“LLM作为高阶形式化工具”（LLM-as-higher-order-formalizer），即让LLM生成一个程序生成器。这一方法将令牌输出与底层形式化及搜索空间的组合爆炸相分离，从而有效应对复杂性挑战。

title: How Vulnerable Are Edge LLMs?
authors: Ao Ding, Hongzong Li, Zi Liang, Zhanpeng Shi, Shuxin Zhuang, Shiqin Tang, Rong Feng, Ping Lu
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed on edge devices under strict computation and quantization constraints, yet their security implications remain unclear. We study query-based knowledge extraction from quantized edge-deployed LLMs under realistic query budgets and show that, although quantization introduces noise, it does not remove the underlying semantic knowledge, allowing substantial behavioral recovery through carefully designed queries. To systematically analyze this risk, we propose \textbf{CLIQ} (\textbf{Cl}ustered \textbf{I}nstruction \textbf{Q}uerying), a structured query construction framework that improves semantic coverage while reducing redundancy. Experiments on quantized Qwen models (INT8/INT4) demonstrate that CLIQ consistently outperforms original queries across BERTScore, BLEU, and ROUGE, enabling more efficient extraction under limited budgets. These results indicate that quantization alone does not provide effective protection against query-based extraction, highlighting a previously underexplored security risk in edge-deployed LLMs.
title_zh: 边缘大模型有多脆弱？
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在计算资源和量化约束严格的边缘设备上日益普及，但其安全影响仍不明确。本文研究了在现实查询预算限制下，针对量化后的边缘部署LLM进行基于查询的知识提取问题，结果表明：尽管量化引入了噪声，但并未消除底层语义知识，通过精心设计的查询仍可实现大量行为信息的恢复。为系统性地分析这一风险，我们提出了**CLIQ**（**Cl**ustered **I**nstruction **Q**uerying）——一种结构化的查询构造框架，能够在提升语义覆盖度的同时减少冗余。在量化后的Qwen模型（INT8/INT4）上的实验表明，CLIQ在BERTScore、BLEU和ROUGE等指标上均持续优于原始查询，显著提升了有限预算下的知识提取效率。这些结果表明，仅依靠量化无法有效防范基于查询的知识提取攻击，揭示了边缘部署LLM中一个此前被忽视的重要安全风险。

title: Willful Disobedience: Automatically Detecting Failures in Agentic Traces
authors: Reshabh K Sharma, Shraddha Barke, Benjamin Zorn
abstract: AI agents are increasingly embedded in real software systems, where they execute multi-step workflows through multi-turn dialogue, tool invocations, and intermediate decisions. These long execution histories, called agentic traces, make validation difficult. Outcome-only benchmarks can miss critical procedural failures, such as incorrect workflow routing, unsafe tool usage, or violations of prompt-specified rules. This paper presents AgentPex, an AI-powered tool designed to systematically evaluate agentic traces. AgentPex extracts behavioral rules from agent prompts and system instructions, then uses these specifications to automatically evaluate traces for compliance. We evaluate AgentPex on 424 traces from τ2-bench across models in telecom, retail, and airline customer service. Our results show that AgentPex distinguishes agent behavior across models and surfaces specification violations that are not captured by outcome-only scoring. It also provides fine-grained analysis by domain and metric, enabling developers to understand agent strengths and weaknesses at scale.
title_zh: 故意的不服从：自动检测智能体轨迹中的失败
abstract_zh: AI代理正越来越多地嵌入到实际软件系统中，通过多轮对话、工具调用和中间决策执行多步骤工作流。这些长期的执行历史被称为“代理轨迹”（agentic traces），使得验证变得困难。仅以结果为导向的评估基准可能会遗漏关键的过程性错误，例如错误的工作流路由、不安全的工具使用或违反提示中指定规则的情况。本文提出了AgentPex，一种由人工智能驱动的工具，旨在系统性地评估代理轨迹。AgentPex从代理提示和系统指令中提取行为规则，并利用这些规范自动检测轨迹是否符合要求。我们在电信、零售和航空客户服务领域的多个模型上，对τ2-bench中的424条轨迹进行了评估。结果显示，AgentPex能够有效区分不同模型的代理行为，并揭示出仅靠结果评分无法捕捉到的规范违规问题。此外，它还能按领域和指标提供细粒度分析，帮助开发者大规模理解代理的优势与不足。

title: Comparing Developer and LLM Biases in Code Evaluation
authors: Aditya Mittal, Ryan Shar, Zichu Wu, Shyam Agarwal, Tongshuang Wu, Chris Donahue, Ameet Talwalkar, Wayne Chi, Valerie Chen
abstract: As LLMs are increasingly used as judges in code applications, they should be evaluated in realistic interactive settings that capture partial context and ambiguous intent. We present TRACE (Tool for Rubric Analysis in Code Evaluation), a framework that evaluates LLM judges' ability to predict human preferences and automatically extracts rubric items to reveal systematic biases in how humans and models weigh each item. Across three modalities -- chat-based programming, IDE autocompletion, and instructed code editing -- we use TRACE to measure how well LLM judges align with developer preferences. Among 13 different models, the best judges underperform human annotators by 12-23%. TRACE identifies 35 significant sources of misalignment between humans and judges across interaction modalities, the majority of which correspond to existing software engineering code quality criteria. For example, in chat-based coding, judges are biased towards longer code explanations while humans prefer shorter ones. We find significant misalignment on the majority of existing code quality dimensions, showing alignment gaps between LLM judges and human preference in realistic coding applications.
title_zh: 比较开发者与大语言模型在代码评估中的偏见
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLM）在代码应用中越来越多地被用作评判者，它们应在能体现部分上下文和模糊意图的真实交互环境中接受评估。我们提出了TRACE（代码评估中的评分标准分析工具），这是一个用于评估LLM评判者预测人类偏好能力的框架，并能自动提取评分标准项，揭示人类与模型在各项标准权重上的系统性偏差。在三种不同交互模式——基于聊天的编程、IDE自动补全以及指令式代码编辑——中，我们利用TRACE衡量LLM评判者与开发者偏好之间的对齐程度。在13种不同模型中，表现最佳的LLM评判者仍比人类标注者低12%至23%。TRACE识别出跨不同交互模式下人类与评判者之间存在35个显著的不一致来源，其中大多数与现有的软件工程代码质量标准相对应。例如，在基于聊天的编程场景中，LLM评判者倾向于偏好更长的代码解释，而人类则更青睐简洁明了的说明。我们在大多数现有代码质量维度上均发现显著偏差，表明在真实编码应用场景中，LLM评判者与人类偏好之间仍存在明显的对齐差距。

title: MARCH: Multi-Agent Reinforced Self-Check for LLM Hallucination
authors: Zhuo Li, Yupeng Zhang, Pengyu Cheng, Jiajun Song, Mengyu Zhou, Hao Li, Shujie Hu, Yu Qin, Erchao Zhao, Xiaoxi Jiang, Guanjun Jiang
abstract: Hallucination remains a critical bottleneck for large language models (LLMs), undermining their reliability in real-world applications, especially in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. While existing hallucination detection methods employ LLM-as-a-judge to verify LLM outputs against retrieved evidence, they suffer from inherent confirmation bias, where the verifier inadvertently reproduces the errors of the original generation. To address this, we introduce Multi-Agent Reinforced Self-Check for Hallucination (MARCH), a framework that enforces rigorous factual alignment by leveraging deliberate information asymmetry. MARCH orchestrates a collaborative pipeline of three specialized agents: a Solver, a Proposer, and a Checker. The Solver generates an initial RAG response, which the Proposer decomposes into claim-level verifiable atomic propositions. Crucially, the Checker validates these propositions against retrieved evidence in isolation, deprived of the Solver's original output. This well-crafted information asymmetry scheme breaks the cycle of self-confirmation bias. By training this pipeline with multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL), we enable the agents to co-evolve and optimize factual adherence. Extensive experiments across hallucination benchmarks demonstrate that MARCH substantially reduces hallucination rates. Notably, an 8B-parameter LLM equipped with MARCH achieves performance competitive with powerful closed-source models. MARCH paves a scalable path for factual self-improvement of LLMs through co-evolution. The code is at https://github.com/Qwen-Applications/MARCH.
title_zh: 三月：用于大语言模型幻觉检测的多智能体强化自我检查
abstract_zh:
幻觉仍是大型语言模型（LLM）面临的关键瓶颈，严重削弱了其在现实应用中的可靠性，尤其是在检索增强生成（RAG）系统中表现尤为突出。尽管现有的幻觉检测方法采用“大模型作为裁判”（LLM-as-a-judge）的方式，将大模型的输出与检索到的证据进行比对验证，但这些方法普遍存在固有的确认偏见问题：验证者在无意中重复了原始生成过程中的错误。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种名为多智能体强化自我检查的幻觉抑制框架——MARCH（Multi-Agent Reinforced Self-Check for Hallucination）。该框架通过刻意引入信息不对称机制，强制实现严格的事实一致性。

MARCH 构建了一个由三个专业智能体协同工作的流水线：求解器（Solver）、提议者（Proposer）和验证者（Checker）。求解器首先生成初始的 RAG 回答；随后，提议者将该回答分解为可逐条验证的原子命题（claim-level verifiable propositions）；关键在于，验证者在独立于求解器原始输出的前提下，仅基于检索到的证据对这些命题进行验证。这种精心设计的信息不对称机制有效打破了自我确认偏见的循环。

通过多智能体强化学习（MARL）对整个流水线进行训练，使各智能体能够共同进化并持续优化其对事实的遵循程度。在多个幻觉检测基准上的大量实验表明，MARCH 显著降低了幻觉发生率。特别值得注意的是，一个配备 MARCH 的 80 亿参数 LLM 所达到的性能，已可与强大的闭源模型相媲美。MARCH 为大模型的事实性自我提升提供了一条可扩展的共进化路径。

代码已开源，地址为：https://github.com/Qwen-Applications/MARCH。

title: Nominal Automata with Name Deallocation
authors: Simon Prucker, Stefan Milius, Lutz Schröder
abstract: Data words with binders formalize concurrently allocated memory. Most name-binding mechanisms in formal languages, such as the $λ$-calculus, adhere to properly nested scoping. In contrast, stateful programming languages with explicit memory allocation and deallocation, such as C, commonly interleave the scopes of allocated memory regions. This phenomenon is captured in dedicated formalisms such as dynamic sequences and bracket algebra, which similarly feature explicit allocation and deallocation of letters. One of the classical formalisms for data languages are register automata, which have been shown to be equivalent to automata models over nominal sets. In the present work, we introduce a nominal automaton model for languages of data words with explicit allocation and deallocation that strongly resemble dynamic sequences, extending existing nominal automata models by adding deallocating transitions. Using a finite NFA-type representation of the model, we establish a Kleene theorem that shows equivalence with a natural expression language. Moreover, we show that our non-deterministic model allows for determinization, a quite unusual phenomenon in the realm of nominal and register automata.
title_zh: 带名称释放的名义自动机
abstract_zh: 带有绑定的数据词形式化了并发分配的内存。在形式语言中，大多数名称绑定机制（如λ-演算）遵循正确嵌套的作用域规则。相比之下，具有显式内存分配与释放的状态型编程语言（如C语言）通常会交错地使用已分配内存区域的作用域。这一现象在专门的形式化系统中得到了描述，例如动态序列和括号代数，这些系统同样显式地包含字母的分配与释放操作。数据语言的经典形式化之一是寄存器自动机，已有研究表明其等价于名义集上的自动机模型。本文中，我们引入了一种针对具有显式分配与释放操作的数据词的语言的名义自动机模型，该模型强烈类似于动态序列，并通过引入释放转移，扩展了现有的名义自动机模型。利用该模型的一种类似有限NFA的表示形式，我们建立了一个克林定理，证明其与一种自然的表达式语言等价。此外，我们还发现，尽管在名义自动机和寄存器自动机领域中极为罕见，但我们的非确定性模型仍可实现确定化。

title: Software Supply Chain Smells: Lightweight Analysis for Secure Dependency Management
authors: Larissa Schmid, Diogo Gaspar, Raphina Liu, Sofia Bobadilla, Benoit Baudry, Martin Monperrus
abstract: Modern software systems heavily rely on third-party dependencies, making software supply chain security a critical concern. We introduce the concept of software supply chain smells as structural indicators that signal potential security risks. We design and evaluate Dirty-Waters, a novel tool for detecting such smells in the supply chains of software packages. Through interviews with practitioners, we show that our proposed smells align with real-world concerns and capture signals considered valuable. A quantitative study of popular packages in the Maven and NPM ecosystems reveals that while smells are prevalent in both, they differ significantly across ecosystems, with traceability and signing issues dominating in Maven and most smells being rare in NPM, due to strong registry-level guarantees. Software supply chain smells support developers and organizations in making informed decisions and improving their software supply chain security posture.
title_zh: 软件供应链异味：轻量级分析实现安全的依赖管理
abstract_zh: 现代软件系统高度依赖第三方依赖项，使得软件供应链安全成为一个关键问题。我们提出了“软件供应链异味”这一概念，作为指示潜在安全风险的结构性信号。我们设计并评估了一款名为 Dirty-Waters 的新工具，用于检测软件包供应链中的此类异味。通过与实践者的访谈，我们发现所提出的异味与现实世界中的关切高度一致，并捕捉到了业界认为有价值的相关信号。对 Maven 和 NPM 生态系统中流行软件包的定量研究显示，尽管异味在两个生态系统中均普遍存在，但其表现形式存在显著差异：Maven 中以可追溯性和签名问题为主，而 NPM 中大多数异味则较为罕见，这主要归因于 NPM 在注册表层面提供的较强保障。软件供应链异味有助于开发者和组织做出更明智的决策，从而提升其软件供应链的安全水平。

title: Enhancing and Reporting Robustness Boundary of Neural Code Models for Intelligent Code Understanding
authors: Tingxu Han, Wei Song, Weisong Sun, Hao Wu, Chunrong Fang, Yuan Xiao, Xiaofang Zhang, Zhenyu Chen, Yang Liu
abstract: With the development of deep learning, Neural Code Models (NCMs) such as CodeBERT and CodeLlama are widely used for code understanding tasks, including defect detection and code classification. However, recent studies have revealed that NCMs are vulnerable to adversarial examples, inputs with subtle perturbations that induce incorrect predictions while remaining difficult to detect. Existing defenses address this issue via data augmentation to empirically improve robustness, but they are costly, offer no theoretical robustness guarantees, and typically require white-box access to model internals, such as gradients. To address the above challenges, we propose ENBECOME, a novel black-box training-free and lightweight adversarial defense. ENBECOME is designed to both enhance empirical robustness and report certified robustness boundaries for NCMs. ENBECOME operates solely during inference, introducing random, semantics-preserving perturbations to input code snippets to smooth the NCM's decision boundaries. This smoothing enables ENBECOME to formally certify a robustness radius within which adversarial examples can never induce misclassification, a property known as certified robustness. We conduct comprehensive experiments across multiple NCM architectures and tasks. Results show that ENBECOME significantly reduces attack success rates while maintaining high accuracy. For example, in defect detection, it reduces the average ASR from 42.43% to 9.74% with only a 0.29% drop in accuracy. Results show that ENBECOME significantly reduces attack success rates while maintaining high accuracy. For example, in defect detection, it reduces the average ASR from 42.43% to 9.74% with only a 0.29% drop in accuracy. Furthermore, ENBECOME achieves an average certified robustness radius of 1.63, meaning that adversarial modifications to no more than 1.63 identifiers are provably ineffective.
title_zh: 增强与报告神经代码模型在智能代码理解中的鲁棒性边界
abstract_zh:
随着深度学习的发展，神经代码模型（NCMs）如CodeBERT和CodeLlama在代码理解任务中得到了广泛应用，包括缺陷检测和代码分类。然而，近期研究发现，NCMs容易受到对抗样本的攻击：这些对抗样本通过微小的扰动输入，导致模型产生错误预测，同时又难以被察觉。现有的防御方法通常依赖数据增强来经验性地提升鲁棒性，但这类方法成本高昂，缺乏理论上的鲁棒性保证，并且通常需要对模型内部（如梯度信息）具有白盒访问权限。

为应对上述挑战，我们提出了一种全新的黑盒、无需训练且轻量级的对抗防御方法——ENBECOME。ENBECOME不仅能够有效提升模型的实证鲁棒性，还能为NCMs提供可认证的鲁棒性边界。该方法仅在推理阶段运行，通过对输入代码片段引入随机但语义保持不变的扰动，平滑NCM的决策边界。这种平滑机制使得ENBECOME能够形式化地证明一个鲁棒性半径，在此半径内的对抗性修改永远无法引发误分类，这一特性被称为“可认证鲁棒性”。

我们在多种NCM架构和任务上进行了全面实验。结果表明，ENBECOME显著降低了攻击成功率，同时保持了较高的准确率。例如，在缺陷检测任务中，其平均攻击成功率（ASR）从42.43%降至9.74%，而准确率仅下降0.29%。此外，ENBECOME实现了平均1.63的可认证鲁棒性半径，这意味着对不超过1.63个标识符进行的对抗性修改，均可被严格证明是无效的。

title: DUPLEX: Agentic Dual-System Planning via LLM-Driven Information Extraction
authors: Keru Hua, Ding Wang, Yaoying Gu, Xiaoguang Ma
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) provide semantic flexibility for robotic task planning, their susceptibility to hallucination and logical inconsistency limits their reliability in long-horizon domains. To bridge the gap between unstructured environments and rigorous plan synthesis, we propose DUPLEX, an agentic dual-system neuro-symbolic architecture that strictly confines the LLM to schema-guided information extraction rather than end-to-end planning or code generation. In our framework, a feed-forward Fast System utilizes a lightweight LLM to extract entities, relations etc. from natural language, deterministically mapping them into a Planning Domain Definition Language (PDDL) problem file for a classical symbolic planner. To resolve complex or underspecified scenarios, a Slow System is activated exclusively upon planning failure, leveraging solver diagnostics to drive a high-capacity LLM in iterative reflection and repair. Extensive evaluations across 12 classical and household planning domains demonstrate that DUPLEX significantly outperforms existing end-to-end and hybrid LLM baselines in both success rate and reliability. These results confirm that The key is not to make the LLM plan better, but to restrict the LLM to the part it is good at - structured semantic grounding - and leave logical plan synthesis to a symbolic planner.
title_zh: 双系统代理式规划：基于大语言模型驱动的信息抽取
abstract_zh: 尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）为机器人任务规划提供了语义灵活性，但其易产生幻觉和逻辑不一致的问题，限制了其在长时域任务中的可靠性。为了弥合非结构化环境与严格计划生成之间的差距，我们提出了DUPLEX——一种代理式双系统神经符号架构，该架构将LLM严格限定于基于模式的信息提取任务，而非端到端的规划或代码生成。在我们的框架中，一个前馈式的快速系统利用轻量级LLM从自然语言中提取实体、关系等信息，并确定性地将其映射为经典符号规划器可处理的规划领域定义语言（PDDL）问题文件。当遇到复杂或描述不充分的场景时，仅在规划失败时激活慢速系统，借助求解器诊断信息驱动高容量LLM进行迭代反思与修复。在12个经典及家庭场景规划任务上的大量评估表明，DUPLEX在成功率和可靠性方面均显著优于现有的端到端及混合型LLM基线方法。这些结果证实：关键并非让LLM更好地进行规划，而是将其限制在擅长的领域——结构化语义定位，而将逻辑规划合成的任务交由符号规划器完成。

title: AVO: Agentic Variation Operators for Autonomous Evolutionary Search
authors: Terry Chen, Zhifan Ye, Bing Xu, Zihao Ye, Timmy Liu, Ali Hassani, Tianqi Chen, Andrew Kerr, Haicheng Wu, Yang Xu, Yu-Jung Chen, Hanfeng Chen, Aditya Kane, Ronny Krashinsky, Ming-Yu Liu, Vinod Grover, Luis Ceze, Roger Bringmann, John Tran, Wei Liu, Fung Xie, Michael Lightstone, Humphrey Shi
abstract: Agentic Variation Operators (AVO) are a new family of evolutionary variation operators that replace the fixed mutation, crossover, and hand-designed heuristics of classical evolutionary search with autonomous coding agents. Rather than confining a language model to candidate generation within a prescribed pipeline, AVO instantiates variation as a self-directed agent loop that can consult the current lineage, a domain-specific knowledge base, and execution feedback to propose, repair, critique, and verify implementation edits. We evaluate AVO on attention, among the most aggressively optimized kernel targets in AI, on NVIDIA Blackwell (B200) GPUs. Over 7 days of continuous autonomous evolution on multi-head attention, AVO discovers kernels that outperform cuDNN by up to 3.5% and FlashAttention-4 by up to 10.5% across the evaluated configurations. The discovered optimizations transfer readily to grouped-query attention, requiring only 30 minutes of additional autonomous adaptation and yielding gains of up to 7.0% over cuDNN and 9.3% over FlashAttention-4. Together, these results show that agentic variation operators move beyond prior LLM-in-the-loop evolutionary pipelines by elevating the agent from candidate generator to variation operator, and can discover performance-critical micro-architectural optimizations that produce kernels surpassing state-of-the-art expert-engineered attention implementations on today's most advanced GPU hardware.
title_zh: AVO：自主进化搜索中的代理变异算子
abstract_zh: 代理变异算子（Agentic Variation Operators, AVO）是一类全新的进化变异算子，它用自主编码代理取代了经典进化搜索中固定的突变、交叉操作以及人工设计的启发式方法。与将语言模型局限于预设流程中生成候选解不同，AVO 将变异过程构建成一个自我驱动的代理循环，该循环能够参考当前的演化谱系、领域特定的知识库以及执行反馈，自主提出、修复、批判并验证代码修改方案。我们在 NVIDIA Blackwell（B200）GPU 上对注意力机制进行了评估，这是人工智能领域中最受优化的内核目标之一。在多头注意力上连续七天的自主进化过程中，AVO 发现的内核性能相比 cuDNN 最高提升 3.5%，相比 FlashAttention-4 最高提升 10.5%（覆盖所有测试配置）。这些发现的优化可轻松迁移至分组查询注意力（grouped-query attention），仅需额外 30 分钟的自主适应，即可实现相比 cuDNN 最高 7.0% 的性能提升，以及相比 FlashAttention-4 最高 9.3% 的提升。综上所述，AVO 不仅突破了以往“大模型在环”式进化范式，更将智能体的角色从候选生成者升级为真正的变异操作者，能够发现关键的微架构级优化，从而在当今最先进的 GPU 硬件上生成超越现有专家手工设计的注意力实现的高性能内核。

title: Walma: Learning to See Memory Corruption in WebAssembly
authors: Oussama Draissi, Mark Günzel, Ahmad-Reza Sadeghi, Lucas Davi
abstract: WebAssembly's (Wasm) monolithic linear memory model facilitates memory corruption attacks that can escalate to cross-site scripting in browsers or go undetected when a malicious host tampers with a module's state. Existing defenses rely on invasive binary instrumentation or custom runtimes, and do not address runtime integrity verification under an adversarial host model. We present Walma, a framework for WebAssembly Linear Memory Attestation that leverages machine learning to detect memory corruption and external tampering by classifying memory snapshots. We evaluate Walma on six real-world CVE-affected applications across three verification backends (cpu-wasm, cpu-tch, gpu) and three instrumentation policies. Our results demonstrate that CNN-based classification can effectively detect memory corruption in applications with structured memory layouts, with coarse-grained boundary checks incurring as low as 1.07x overhead, while fine-grained monitoring introduces higher (1.5x--1.8x) but predictable costs. Our evaluation quantifies the accuracy and overhead trade-offs across deployment configurations, demonstrating the practical feasibility of ML-based memory attestation for WebAssembly.
title_zh: 沃尔玛：在WebAssembly中学会识别内存损坏
abstract_zh: WebAssembly（Wasm）的单体线性内存模型使得内存破坏攻击得以实现，这些攻击在浏览器中可能演变为跨站脚本攻击，或在恶意主机篡改模块状态时难以被察觉。现有的防御机制依赖于侵入性的二进制插桩或定制运行时环境，且无法在对抗性主机模型下实现运行时完整性验证。我们提出了Walma——一种面向WebAssembly线性内存的可证明性框架，该框架利用机器学习技术通过分类内存快照来检测内存破坏和外部篡改。我们在三个验证后端（cpu-wasm、cpu-tch、gpu）以及三种插桩策略下，对六个真实世界中受CVE影响的应用程序进行了评估。结果表明，基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的分类方法能够有效检测具有结构化内存布局的应用程序中的内存破坏问题；粗粒度边界检查带来的开销低至1.07倍，而细粒度监控虽引入更高的开销（1.5x–1.8x），但其成本可预测。我们的评估量化了不同部署配置下的准确率与开销权衡，证明了基于机器学习的WebAssembly内存可证明性在实际应用中的可行性。

title: PowerFlow-DNN: Compiler-Directed Fine-Grained Power Orchestration for End-to-End Edge AI Inference
authors: Paul Chen, Jeongeun Kim, Wenbo Zhu, Yuanhan Li, Shunyao Huang, Chenjie Weng, Christopher Torng
abstract: Edge AI systems often operate under stringent energy and volume constraints that demand extreme efficiency under limited battery capacity, with requirements worsening as intelligent capability demands advance. Prior literature suggests that fine-grained power orchestration, including DVFS and power gating, enables significant energy efficiency benefits that cannot be left unexploited, while still exhibiting unexplored challenges. We observe that layer-level approaches incur unintended overheads due to inter-layer coupling of power control decisions, and that jointly managing these mechanisms under practical constraints such as limited voltage rails and transition overheads leads to a rapidly growing combinatorial schedule space. To address this, we propose PowerFlow-DNN, a compiler-directed framework for end-to-end power-state orchestration in ultra-low-power accelerators. By constructing a rigorous problem formulation for deadline-constrained, real-time, periodic inference as a unified inter-layer power-scheduling problem, our framework enables automated discovery of energy-minimal power-state schedules that adhere to a deadline while accounting for end-to-end, inter-layer impacts. We evaluate the framework on a DNN accelerator VLSI implementation in TSMC 40nm technology. Across representative edge networks, we show that PowerFlow-DNN discovers near-optimal solutions under the discretized formulation and achieves energy within 0.68\% of the exact ILP oracle, reducing energy by up to 37\% compared to an aggressive baseline without power orchestration, while reasoning over a combinatorial schedule space of over $10^{160}$ possible power-state assignments, yet operating on a structured layered state graph that enables efficient optimization, achieving up to 2.14$\times$ solver speedup via lightweight pruning.
title_zh: PowerFlow-DNN：面向端到端边缘AI推理的编译器导向细粒度功耗调度
abstract_zh: 边缘AI系统通常在严格的能耗和体积限制下运行，要求在有限的电池容量下实现极致的能效，而随着智能能力需求的提升，这些要求也日益严峻。以往的研究表明，细粒度的功耗调度（如DVFS和电源门控）能够带来显著的能效提升，这些优势不容忽视，但同时也存在尚未充分探索的挑战。我们观察到，基于层的调度方法由于各层之间功耗控制决策的耦合关系，会引入不必要的开销；同时，在实际约束（如有限的电压轨和切换开销）下联合管理这些机制，会导致组合调度空间呈指数级增长。为应对这一问题，我们提出了PowerFlow-DNN——一种面向超低功耗加速器端到端功耗状态调度的编译器指导框架。通过将具有截止时间约束、实时性要求且周期性的推理任务建模为统一的层间功耗调度问题，该框架能够自动发现满足截止时间要求的能耗最小化功耗状态调度方案，并充分考虑端到端的层间影响。我们在TSMC 40nm工艺节点上实现的DNN加速器硬件平台上对框架进行了评估。在多种典型的边缘神经网络上，PowerFlow-DNN在离散化建模下发现了接近最优的解，其能耗仅比精确的ILP基准（oracle）高出0.68%，相比不采用功耗调度的激进基线方案，最高可降低37%的能耗。尽管需在超过$10^{160}$种可能的功耗状态分配中进行搜索，该框架仍通过基于结构化分层状态图的高效优化策略，实现了高达2.14倍的求解器加速，得益于轻量级剪枝技术的引入。

title: DVM: Real-Time Kernel Generation for Dynamic AI Models
authors: Jingzhi Fang, Xiong Gao, Renwei Zhang, Zichun Ye, Lei Chen, Jie Zhao, Chengnuo Huang, Hui Xu, Xuefeng Jin
abstract: Dynamism is common in AI computation, e.g., the dynamic tensor shapes and the dynamic control flows in models. Due to the long compilation time, existing runtime compilation damages the model efficiency, while the offline compilers either suffer from the long compilation time and device memory footprint to cover all the possible execution instances of a dynamic model, or sacrifice optimization opportunities for usability. In this paper, we rethink the feasibility of runtime compilation for dynamic models and identify that the key for it to work is to speed up the compilation or hide the compilation overhead. To do this, we propose a real-time compiler, DVM. In DVM, we design a runtime operator compiler based on a bytecode virtual machine to perform effective and efficient compilation for each dynamic operator instance given its input. Specifically, instead of compiling programs into machine code, we encode the operator program into bytecode on the CPU and decode the bytecode into virtual instructions for direct execution on the NPU. Based on the runtime operator compiler, we further propose an operator fuser, which performs symbol-deduction-based fusion on static graphs and runtime fusion on dynamic graphs. Both pattern- and stacking-based fusion are supported to increase fusion opportunities. Evaluation on operators, subgraphs, and models shows that, compared with TorchInductor, PyTorch-eager and MindSpore-graph-O0, we are up to 11.77$\times$ better in terms of the operator/model efficiency and up to 5 orders of magnitude faster in terms of the maximum compilation time.
title_zh: DVM：面向动态AI模型的实时内核生成
abstract_zh: 动态性在人工智能计算中十分常见，例如模型中的动态张量形状和动态控制流。由于编译时间过长，现有的运行时编译机制会损害模型的执行效率；而离线编译器则要么面临漫长的编译时间和巨大的设备内存占用，以覆盖动态模型所有可能的执行实例，要么为了提升易用性而牺牲优化机会。本文重新思考了针对动态模型进行运行时编译的可行性，并指出其成功的关键在于加速编译过程或隐藏编译开销。为此，我们提出了一种实时编译器——DVM。在DVM中，我们设计了一个基于字节码虚拟机的运行时算子编译器，能够根据每个动态算子实例的输入，高效且有效地完成编译。具体而言，不同于将程序直接编译为机器码，我们先在CPU上将算子程序编码为字节码，再在NPU上将字节码解码为虚拟指令并直接执行。基于该运行时算子编译器，我们进一步提出了一个算子融合器，它在静态图上采用基于符号推导的融合策略，在动态图上实现运行时融合。该融合器同时支持基于模式和基于堆叠的融合方式，显著提升了融合机会。对算子、子图及完整模型的评估表明，与TorchInductor、PyTorch-eager以及MindSpore-graph-O0相比，我们的方法在算子/模型效率方面最高提升达11.77倍，最大编译时间最快快了五个数量级。

title: RVLM: Recursive Vision-Language Models with Adaptive Depth
authors: Nicanor Mayumu, Zeenath Khan, Melodena Stephens, Patrick Mukala, Farhad Oroumchian
abstract: Medical AI systems face two fundamental limitations. First, conventional vision-language models (VLMs) perform single-pass inference, yielding black-box predictions that cannot be audited or explained in clinical terms. Second, iterative reasoning systems that expose intermediate steps rely on fixed iteration budgets wasting compute on simple cases while providing insufficient depth for complex ones. We address both limitations with a unified framework. RVLM replaces single-pass inference with an iterative generate-execute loop: at each step, the model writes Python code, invokes vision sub-agents, manipulates images, and accumulates evidence. Every diagnostic claim is grounded in executable code, satisfying auditability requirements of clinical AI governance frameworks. RRouter makes iteration depth adaptive: a lightweight controller predicts the optimal budget from task-complexity features, then monitors progress and terminates early when reasoning stalls. We evaluate on BraTS 2023 Meningioma (brain MRI) and MIMIC-CXR (chest X-ray) using Gemini 2.5 Flash without fine-tuning. Across repeated runs, RVLM shows high consistency on salient findings (e.g., mass presence and enhancement) and can detect cross-modal discrepancies between Fluid-Attenuated Inversion Recovery (FLAIR) signal characteristics and segmentation boundaries. On MIMIC-CXR, it generates structured reports and correctly recognises view-specific artefacts. Code: https://github.com/nican2018/rvlm.
title_zh: RVLM：具有自适应深度的递归视觉-语言模型
abstract_zh: 医疗人工智能系统面临两大根本性局限。首先，传统的视觉-语言模型（VLM）采用单次推理方式，产生无法审计或以临床术语解释的“黑箱”预测结果。其次，虽有能够展示中间推理步骤的迭代推理系统，但其依赖固定的迭代预算，在简单任务上浪费计算资源，而在复杂任务中又缺乏足够的推理深度。针对上述问题，我们提出一个统一框架。RVLM 将单次推理替换为迭代式的“生成-执行”循环：在每一步中，模型生成可执行的 Python 代码，调用视觉子代理，操作图像，并累积证据。每一个诊断结论均基于可执行代码，满足临床人工智能治理框架对可审计性的要求。RRouter 实现了迭代深度的自适应：一个轻量级控制器根据任务复杂度特征预测最优迭代预算，并实时监控推理进展，在推理停滞时提前终止。我们在 BraTS 2023 脑膜瘤（脑部 MRI）和 MIMIC-CXR（胸部 X 光）数据集上进行了评估，使用 Gemini 2.5 Flash 模型且未进行微调。在多次重复实验中，RVLM 在关键发现（如占位性病变的存在及其强化特征）上表现出高度一致性，并能有效识别 Fluid-Attenuated Inversion Recovery（FLAIR）信号特征与分割边界之间的跨模态不一致。在 MIMIC-CXR 数据集上，该系统还能生成结构化报告，并准确识别特定体位相关的伪影。代码开源地址：https://github.com/nican2018/rvlm。

title: How are AI agents used? Evidence from 177,000 MCP tools
authors: Merlin Stein
abstract: Today's AI agents are built on large language models (LLMs) equipped with tools to access and modify external environments, such as corporate file systems, API-accessible platforms and websites. AI agents offer the promise of automating computer-based tasks across the economy. However, developers, researchers and governments lack an understanding of how AI agents are currently being used, and for what kinds of (consequential) tasks. To address this gap, we evaluated 177,436 agent tools created from 11/2024 to 02/2026 by monitoring public Model Context Protocol (MCP) server repositories, the current predominant standard for agent tools. We categorise tools according to their direct impact: perception tools to access and read data, reasoning tools to analyse data or concepts, and action tools to directly modify external environments, like file editing, sending emails or steering drones in the physical world. We use O*NET mapping to identify each tool's task domain and consequentiality. Software development accounts for 67% of all agent tools, and 90% of MCP server downloads. Notably, the share of 'action' tools rose from 27% to 65% of total usage over the 16-month period sampled. While most action tools support medium-stakes tasks like editing files, there are action tools for higher-stakes tasks like financial transactions. Using agentic financial transactions as an example, we demonstrate how governments and regulators can use this monitoring method to extend oversight beyond model outputs to the tool layer to monitor risks of agent deployment.
title_zh: AI代理是如何被使用的？来自17.7万个MCP工具的证据
abstract_zh:
如今的AI代理基于大型语言模型（LLMs），并配备各类工具，使其能够访问和修改外部环境，例如企业文件系统、可通过API访问的平台及网站。AI代理有望实现经济领域中计算机任务的自动化。然而，开发者、研究人员以及政府目前对AI代理的实际使用情况及其所执行任务的性质（尤其是具有重大影响的任务）仍缺乏了解。为填补这一空白，我们通过监测公开的Model Context Protocol（MCP）服务器仓库——当前代理工具的主要标准——对2024年11月至2026年2月期间创建的177,436个代理工具进行了评估。我们根据工具的直接作用将其分类：感知类工具用于访问和读取数据，推理类工具用于分析数据或概念，行动类工具则可直接修改外部环境，如编辑文件、发送邮件，甚至操控物理世界中的无人机。

我们采用O*NET职业分类体系来识别每个工具所属的任务领域及其后果严重性。结果显示，软件开发占所有代理工具的67%，并贡献了90%的MCP服务器下载量。值得注意的是，在所考察的16个月期间，行动类工具的使用占比从27%上升至65%。尽管大多数行动类工具支持中等风险的任务（如文件编辑），但也存在用于高风险任务（如金融交易）的工具。以代理执行金融交易为例，我们展示了政府与监管机构如何利用此类监控方法，将监督范围从模型输出扩展至工具层，从而有效监测代理部署所带来的潜在风险。

title: AgentRFC: Security Design Principles and Conformance Testing for Agent Protocols
authors: Shenghan Zheng, Qifan Zhang
abstract: AI agent protocols -- including MCP, A2A, ANP, and ACP -- enable autonomous agents to discover capabilities, delegate tasks, and compose services across trust boundaries. Despite massive deployment (MCP alone has 97M+ monthly SDK downloads), no systematic security framework for these protocols exists. We present three contributions. First, the Agent Protocol Stack, a 6-layer architectural model that defines what a complete agent protocol must specify at each layer -- analogous to ITU-T X.800 for the OSI stack. Second, the Agent-Agnostic Security Model, 11 security principles formalized as TLA+ invariants, each tagged with a property taxonomy (spec-mandated, spec-recommended, aasm-hardening, aps-completeness) that distinguishes protocol non-conformance from framework-imposed security requirements. Third, AgentConform, a two-phase conformance checker that (i)extracts normative clauses from protocol specifications into a typed Protocol~IR with explicit Protocol/Environment/Adversary action separation, (ii)compiles the IR into TLA+ models and model-checks them against AASM invariants, then (iii)replays counterexample traces against live SDK implementations to confirm findings. We introduce the Composition Safety (CS) principle: security properties that hold for individual protocols can break when protocols are composed through shared infrastructure. We demonstrate this with formal models of five protocol composition patterns, revealing cross-protocol design gaps that individual protocol analysis cannot detect. Preliminary application to representative agent protocols reveals recurrent gaps in credential lifecycle, consent enforcement, audit completeness, and composition safety. Some findings are under coordinated disclosure; full evaluation details will be released in the complete version.
title_zh: AgentRFC：代理协议的安全设计原则与符合性测试
abstract_zh:
AI代理协议——包括MCP、A2A、ANP和ACP——使自主代理能够发现能力、委派任务，并在信任边界之间组合服务。尽管这些协议已大规模部署（仅MCP一项就拥有超过9700万次每月SDK下载），但目前尚无系统性的安全框架来保障这些协议的安全性。本文提出三项主要贡献。

第一，**代理协议栈**（Agent Protocol Stack）：一个六层的架构模型，定义了完整代理协议在每一层必须明确指定的内容——类似于ITU-T X.800对OSI七层模型的规范作用。

第二，**代理无关安全模型**（Agent-Agnostic Security Model）：将11条安全原则形式化为TLA+不变式（invariants），每一条均附带属性分类标签（spec-mandated、spec-recommended、aasm-hardening、aps-completeness），用以区分协议不符合规范与框架所施加的安全要求之间的界限。

第三，**AgentConform**：一种两阶段合规性检查工具，其流程如下：(i) 从协议规范中提取规范性条款，构建具有显式“协议/环境/对手”动作分离的类型化协议中间表示（Protocol IR）；(ii) 将该IR编译为TLA+模型，并使用AASM不变式进行模型检验；(iii) 将反例轨迹回放至实际SDK实现中，验证检测结果的真实性。

我们引入了**组合安全性**（Composition Safety, CS）原则：某些安全属性在单个协议中成立，但在通过共享基础设施进行协议组合时可能被破坏。我们通过五个协议组合模式的形式化建模，揭示了传统单一协议分析无法发现的跨协议设计缺陷。

初步应用于代表性代理协议的结果表明，在凭证生命周期管理、同意机制执行、审计完整性以及组合安全性方面存在反复出现的安全缺口。部分发现正处于协调披露阶段；完整评估细节将在最终版本中发布。

title: Enhanced Mycelium of Thought (EMoT): A Bio-Inspired Hierarchical Reasoning Architecture with Strategic Dormancy and Mnemonic Encoding
authors: Florian Odi Stummer
abstract: Current prompting paradigms for large language models (LLMs), including Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and Tree-of-Thoughts (ToT), follow linear or tree-structured reasoning paths that lack persistent memory, strategic dormancy, and cross-domain synthesis. We present the Enhanced Mycelium of Thought (EMoT) framework, a bio-inspired reasoning architecture that organises cognitive processing into a four-level hierarchy (Micro, Meso, Macro, Meta), implements strategic dormancy and reactivation of reasoning nodes, and integrates a Memory Palace with five mnemonic encoding styles. EMoT is a research prototype for complex, multi-domain problems, not a general-purpose prompting enhancement. Two complementary evaluations reveal a characteristic trade-off. In a blind LLM-as-Judge evaluation across three domains, EMoT achieved near-parity with CoT (4.20 vs. 4.33/5.0) with higher stability, and outperformed CoT on Cross-Domain Synthesis (4.8 vs. 4.4). Ablation studies show that strategic dormancy is architecturally essential (quality collapsed from 4.2 to 1.0 when disabled). On a 15-item short-answer benchmark, EMoT (27%) substantially underperformed simpler baselines, confirming systematic overthinking on simple problems. These results are subject to important limitations: small sample sizes (n=3 complex cases, n=15 short-answer items), LLM-as-Judge evaluation with potential self-preference bias, and approximately 33-fold computational cost overhead. To our knowledge, EMoT is the first reasoning framework to combine hierarchical topology, strategic thought dormancy with reactivation, and mnemonic memory encoding in a single architecture.
title_zh: 思维菌丝增强体（EMoT）：一种具有战略休眠与记忆编码的生物启发分层推理架构
abstract_zh:
当前大型语言模型（LLM）的提示范式，包括思维链（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）和思维树（Tree-of-Thoughts, ToT），均遵循线性或树状推理路径，缺乏持久记忆、策略性休眠以及跨领域综合能力。我们提出一种受生物启发的推理架构——增强型思想菌丝网络（Enhanced Mycelium of Thought, EMoT），其将认知处理组织为四级层次结构（微观、介观、宏观、元层级），实现推理节点的策略性休眠与再激活，并集成了一座包含五种记忆编码方式的“记忆宫殿”。EMoT 是针对复杂多领域问题的研究原型，而非通用提示增强工具。

两项互补评估揭示了显著的权衡特征：在三个领域的盲测 LLM 作为裁判评估中，EMoT 与 CoT 相比表现接近（4.20 vs. 4.33/5.0），且稳定性更高；在跨领域综合任务上，EMoT 显著优于 CoT（4.8 vs. 4.4）。消融实验表明，策略性休眠在架构上至关重要——当该功能被禁用时，推理质量从 4.2 急剧下降至 1.0。然而，在一项包含 15 道简答题的基准测试中，EMoT 的得分仅为 27%，远低于简单基线模型，证实其在简单问题上存在系统性过度思考现象。

上述结果受到若干重要限制：样本量较小（仅 3 个复杂案例，15 道简答题）、采用 LLM 作为裁判的评估可能存在自我偏好偏差，且计算开销约为基线的 33 倍。据我们所知，EMoT 是首个在同一架构中融合分层拓扑结构、具有再激活机制的策略性思维休眠，以及基于记忆术的记忆编码系统的推理框架。

title: Vibe Coding XR: Accelerating AI + XR Prototyping with XR Blocks and Gemini
authors: Ruofei Du, Benjamin Hersh, David Li, Nels Numan, Xun Qian, Yanhe Chen, Zhongyi Zhou, Xingyue Chen, Jiahao Ren, Robert Timothy Bettridge, Steve Toh, David Kim
abstract: While large language models have accelerated software development through "vibe coding", prototyping intelligent Extended Reality (XR) experiences remains inaccessible due to the friction of complex game engines and low-level sensor integration. To bridge this gap, we contribute XR Blocks, an open-source, modular WebXR framework that abstracts spatial computing complexities into high-level, human-centered primitives. Building upon this foundation, we present Vibe Coding XR, an end-to-end rapid prototyping workflow that leverages LLMs to translate natural language intent directly into functional XR software. Using a web-based interface, creators can transform high-level prompts (e.g., "create a dandelion that reacts to hand") into interactive WebXR applications in under a minute. We provide a preliminary technical evaluation on a pilot dataset (VCXR60) alongside diverse application scenarios highlighting mixed-reality realism, multi-modal interaction, and generative AI integrations. By democratizing spatial software creation, this work empowers practitioners to bypass low-level hurdles and rapidly move from "idea to reality." Code and live demos are available at https://xrblocks.github.io/gem and https://github.com/google/xrblocks.
title_zh: Vibe Coding XR：通过XR模块与Gemini加速AI + XR原型开发
abstract_zh: 尽管大型语言模型通过“直觉编程”（vibe coding）加速了软件开发，但构建智能扩展现实（XR）体验仍因复杂的游戏引擎和底层传感器集成带来的摩擦而难以实现。为弥合这一鸿沟，我们提出了 XR Blocks——一个开源、模块化的 WebXR 框架，将空间计算的复杂性抽象为高层级、以用户为中心的基本构件。在此基础上，我们进一步提出 Vibe Coding XR，一种端到端的快速原型设计工作流，利用大语言模型（LLM）直接将自然语言意图转化为可运行的XR软件。通过基于网页的界面，创作者仅需输入高层次指令（例如：“创建一个对挥手有反应的蒲公英”），即可在不到一分钟内生成交互式 WebXR 应用。我们基于初步的试点数据集（VCXR60）进行了技术评估，并展示了多种应用场景，涵盖混合现实的真实感、多模态交互以及生成式人工智能的融合。本研究致力于降低空间软件创作门槛，使实践者能够绕过底层技术障碍，迅速实现从“想法到现实”的转化。代码与实时演示可访问：https://xrblocks.github.io/gem 和 https://github.com/google/xrblocks。

title: Composer 2 Technical Report
authors: Cursor Reseach, :, Aaron Chan, Ahmed Shalaby, Alexander Wettig, Aman Sanger, Andrew Zhai, Anurag Ajay, Ashvin Nair, Charlie Snell, Chen Lu, Chen Shen, Emily Jia, Federico Cassano, Hanpeng Liu, Haoyu Chen, Henry Wildermuth, Jacob Jackson, Janet Li, Jediah Katz, Jiajun Yao, Joey Hejna, Josh Warner, Julius Vering, Kevin Frans, Lee Danilek, Less Wright, Lujing Cen, Luke Melas-Kyriazi, Michael Truell, Michiel de Jong, Naman Jain, Nate Schmidt, Nathan Wang, Niklas Muennighoff, Oleg Rybkin, Paul Loh, Phillip Kravtsov, Rishabh Yadav, Sahil Shah, Sam Kottler, Alexander M Rush, Shengtong Zhang, Shomil Jain, Sriram Sankar, Stefan Heule, Stuart H. Sul, Sualeh Asif, Victor Rong, Wanqi Zhu, William Lin, Yuchen Wu, Yuri Volkov, Yury Zemlyanskiy, Zack Holbrook, Zhiyuan Zhang
abstract: Composer 2 is a specialized model designed for agentic software engineering. The model demonstrates strong long-term planning and coding intelligence while maintaining the ability to efficiently solve problems for interactive use. The model is trained in two phases: first, continued pretraining to improve the model's knowledge and latent coding ability, followed by large-scale reinforcement learning to improve end-to-end coding performance through stronger reasoning, accurate multi-step execution, and coherence on long-horizon realistic coding problems. We develop infrastructure to support training in the same Cursor harness that is used by the deployed model, with equivalent tools and structure, and use environments that match real problems closely. To measure the ability of the model on increasingly difficult tasks, we introduce a benchmark derived from real software engineering problems in large codebases including our own. Composer 2 is a frontier-level coding model and demonstrates a process for training strong domain-specialized models. On our CursorBench evaluations the model achieves a major improvement in accuracy compared to previous Composer models (61.3).
