On public benchmarks the model scores 61.7 on Terminal-Bench and 73.7 on SWE-bench Multilingual in our harness, comparable to state-of-the-art systems.
title_zh: Composer 2 技术报告
abstract_zh: Composer 2 是一款专为智能软件工程设计的模型。该模型在保持高效交互解决问题能力的同时，展现出强大的长期规划与编程智能。模型采用两阶段训练：首先进行持续预训练，以提升模型的知识储备和潜在编码能力；随后通过大规模强化学习，增强端到端的编码表现，包括更优的推理能力、精准的多步执行以及在长周期真实编程任务中保持连贯性。我们构建了与部署模型所使用的 Cursor 工具环境一致的训练基础设施，确保工具和结构完全匹配，并采用高度贴近真实问题的环境进行训练。为了衡量模型在日益复杂任务中的表现，我们引入了一个基于大型代码库（包括我们自身项目）中真实软件工程问题的基准测试。Composer 2 是当前前沿水平的编程模型，展示了训练高性能领域专用模型的有效路径。在我们的 CursorBench 评估中，该模型相较于之前的 Composer 模型实现了显著的准确率提升（达到 61.3）。在公开基准测试中，模型在 Terminal-Bench 上得分为 61.7，在 SWE-bench Multilingual 上得分为 73.7（使用相同环境），表现与当前最先进系统相当。

title: Mechanic: Sorrifier-Driven Formal Decomposition Workflow for Automated Theorem Proving
authors: Ruichen Qiu, Yichuan Cao, Junqi Liu, Dakai Guo, Xiao-Shan Gao, Lihong Zhi, Ruyong Feng
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) and LLM-based agents have substantially improved the capabilities of automated theorem proving. However, for problems requiring complex mathematical reasoning, current systems rarely succeed on the first try and must repeatedly modify their proof strategies. Existing approaches for handling failed attempts typically either discard the entire proof and regenerate it from scratch or iteratively fix errors within the proof. The former is inefficient, as it may abandon mostly correct reasoning due to localized errors, while the latter, although preserving prior progress, leads to progressively longer contexts which progressively degrades the model's ability to attend to the remaining unresolved subproblems. To address this dilemma, we propose Mechanic, a novel agent system that employs a sorry-driven formal decomposition strategy. By leveraging the sorry placeholder in Lean to precisely isolate unresolved subgoals while preserving the surrounding verified proof structure, Mechanic extracts each failed subproblem into a clean, self-contained context and resolves it independently. This avoids both the waste of full regeneration and the excessive context length induced by repeated repairs. Experimental results on challenging mathematical competition benchmarks, including IMO 2025 and Putnam 2025, demonstrate that our agent achieves significant advantages in proving efficiency.
title_zh: 机械师：基于排序器驱动的形式化分解工作流，用于自动定理证明
abstract_zh: 近年来，大型语言模型（LLMs）及其基于LLM的智能体在自动定理证明方面取得了显著进展。然而，对于需要复杂数学推理的问题，当前系统很少能在首次尝试中成功，往往需要反复调整其证明策略。现有的失败处理方法通常要么完全丢弃整个证明并从头重新生成，要么在原有证明中逐次修正错误。前者效率低下，可能因局部错误而放弃大部分正确的推理过程；后者虽然保留了先前的进展，但会导致上下文不断变长，从而逐步削弱模型对尚未解决子问题的关注能力。为解决这一困境，我们提出了Mechanic——一种新型智能体系统，采用“抱歉驱动”的形式化分解策略。该系统利用Lean中的“sorry”占位符，精确地将未解决的子目标与已验证的证明结构分离开来，将每个失败的子问题提取为一个干净、自包含的上下文，并独立求解。这种方法既避免了完全重生成带来的资源浪费，也杜绝了反复修复导致的上下文过长问题。在包括IMO 2025和Putnam 2025在内的高难度数学竞赛基准测试上的实验结果表明，我们的智能体在证明效率方面具有显著优势。

title: Adapting the MVVM pattern to C++ frontends and Agda-based backends
authors: Viktor Csimma
abstract: Using agda2hs and ad-hoc Haskell FFI bindings, writing Qt applications in C++ with Agda- or Haskell-based backends (possibly including correctness proofs) is already possible. However, there was no repeatable methodology to do so, nor to use \emph{arbitrary} Haskell built-in libraries in Agda code. We present a well-documented, general methodology to address this, applying the ideas of the Model-View-ViewModel architecture to models implemented in functional languages. This is augmented by a software development kit providing easy installation and automated compilation. For obstacles arising, we provide solutions and ideas that are novel contributions by themselves. We describe and compare solutions for using arbitrary Haskell built-ins in Agda code, highlighting their advantages and disadvantages. Also, for user interruption, we present a new Haskell future design that, to the best of our knowledge, is the first to provide for arbitrary interruption and the first to provide for interruption via direct FFI calls from C and C++. Finally, we prove with benchmarks that the agda2hs compiler at the base of our methodology is viable when compared to other solutions, specifically to the OCaml extraction feature of Rocq and the default MAlonzo backend of Agda.
title_zh: 将MVVM模式适配到C++前端和基于Agda的后端
abstract_zh: 通过使用 agda2hs 和特定于用途的 Haskell FFI 绑定，如今已可在 C++ 中编写 Qt 应用程序，并采用基于 Agda 或 Haskell 的后端（甚至包括正确性证明）。然而，此前缺乏一种可重复的方法来实现这一目标，也难以在 Agda 代码中使用任意的 Haskell 内建库。本文提出了一种经过详尽文档化、通用性强的方法论，将 Model-View-ViewModel（MVVM）架构的思想应用于以函数式语言实现的模型。该方法还配套提供了一个软件开发工具包（SDK），支持便捷安装与自动化编译。针对实施过程中遇到的挑战，我们提出了若干新颖且具有独立贡献意义的解决方案。本文详细描述并比较了在 Agda 代码中使用任意 Haskell 内建库的多种方案，分析了各自的优缺点。此外，针对用户中断问题，我们提出了一种全新的 Haskell 未来（Future）设计，据我们所知，这是首个支持任意中断的方案，也是首个允许通过直接从 C 和 C++ 调用 FFI 实现中断的方案。最后，我们通过基准测试证明，支撑本方法论的核心编译器 agda2hs 在性能上具备可行性，其表现优于其他现有方案，特别是 Rocq 的 OCaml 提取功能以及 Agda 默认的 MAlonzo 后端。

title: Likelihood hacking in probabilistic program synthesis
authors: Jacek Karwowski, Younesse Kaddar, Zihuiwen Ye, Nikolay Malkin, Sam Staton
abstract: When language models are trained by reinforcement learning (RL) to write probabilistic programs, they can artificially inflate their marginal-likelihood reward by producing programs whose data distribution fails to normalise instead of fitting the data better. We call this failure likelihood hacking (LH). We formalise LH in a core probabilistic programming language (PPL) and give sufficient syntactic conditions for its prevention, proving that a safe language fragment $\mathcal{L}_{\text{safe}}$ satisfying these conditions cannot produce likelihood-hacking programs. Empirically, we show that GRPO-trained models generating PyMC code discover LH exploits within the first few training steps, driving violation rates well above the untrained-model baseline. We implement $\mathcal{L}_{\text{safe}}$'s conditions as $\texttt{SafeStan}$, a LH-resistant modification of Stan, and show empirically that it prevents LH under optimisation pressure. These results show that language-level safety constraints are both theoretically grounded and effective in practice for automated Bayesian model discovery.
title_zh: 概率程序合成中的似然性操纵
abstract_zh: 当语言模型通过强化学习（RL）训练以编写概率程序时，它们可能会通过生成数据分布无法归一化的程序，而非更好地拟合数据，来人为地夸大其边际似然奖励。我们称这种失败为似然欺骗（Likelihood Hacking, LH）。本文在一种核心概率编程语言（PPL）中形式化了LH，并给出了防止该问题的充分语法条件，证明满足这些条件的安全语言片段 $\mathcal{L}_{\text{safe}}$ 无法生成似然欺骗型程序。实证研究表明，经过GRPO训练、生成PyMC代码的语言模型在训练初期的几个步骤内便发现了LH漏洞，导致违规率远高于未训练模型的基线水平。我们基于 $\mathcal{L}_{\text{safe}}$ 的条件实现了 $\texttt{SafeStan}$——一个对似然欺骗具有鲁棒性的Stan语言改进版本，并通过实验验证其在优化压力下能够有效防止LH。这些结果表明，语言层面的安全约束不仅在理论上具有坚实基础，而且在自动化贝叶斯模型发现的实际应用中也十分有效。

title: Integrating an Innovative Named Entity Recognition Algorithm Within Knowledge Engineering Frameworks
authors: Yan Li
publish: 2025 11th International Conference on Computer and Communications (ICCC)
abstract: This study developed a complete system based on the BERT model to be applied in programming courses of engineering and science at higher education institutions, thereby meeting and adapting to the growing demand for artificial intelligence literacy in the field of HE (Higher Education). Based on the traditional BERT model, this study proposed a new model innovated by named entity recognition. A major innovation of this study is that it independently constructed a question-and-answer dataset based on student learning data and conducted experiments and analysis on this self-built dataset, with results indicating that this model is more effective than classic models. Another significant innovation of this study is the development of a question-and-answer system based on both the teacher and the student sides, aimed at helping teachers and students further strengthen and understand common issues in programming learning. The new model, which combines innovations in named entity recognition technology, was experimented on and analyzed using the self-built question-and-answer dataset, showing that this model is more efficient than traditional models. In the case study comparison based on two universities, the system was confirmed to facilitate autonomous learning during the programming learning process and to infer personalized learning plans suitable for students based on learning paths. After the analysis of the experiment, a majority of the teachers and students agreed that this system could improve the efficiency of programming learning to some extent.
title_zh: 在知识工程框架中集成一种创新的命名实体识别算法
abstract_zh: 本研究基于BERT模型构建了一个完整的系统，旨在应用于高等教育机构中的工程与科学类编程课程，以满足并适应高等教育领域对人工智能素养日益增长的需求。在传统BERT模型的基础上，本研究提出了一种通过命名实体识别技术进行创新的新模型。本研究的一大创新之处在于，独立基于学生学习数据构建了问答数据集，并在此自建数据集上进行了实验与分析，结果表明该模型相较于经典模型更具有效性。另一项重要创新是开发了面向教师与学生双端的问答系统，旨在帮助师生更好地强化和理解编程学习中的共性问题。结合命名实体识别技术革新所提出的新型模型，在自建问答数据集上进行了实验与分析，结果显示该模型较传统模型更为高效。在基于两所大学的案例对比研究中，系统被证实能够促进编程学习过程中的自主学习，并能根据学习路径推断出适合学生的个性化学习方案。实验分析后，多数教师与学生均认为该系统在一定程度上提升了编程学习的效率。

title: A Review of Screenshot-to-Code Generation Systems
authors: Padamjit Sandhu, Pankaj Khurana, Jimmy Singla
publish: 2026 5th International Conference on Communication, Computing and Electronics Systems (ICCCES)
abstract: The conversion of screenshots into source code is very important phase in the automation of user interface development. There are artificial-based tools which can understand images and further convert them into executable source code. These system's performance is further improved with the incorporation of generative artificial intelligence. These generative artificial intelligence-based systems achieve high accuracy in converting sketches into source code. Further these systems are helpful for developers, otherwise it was time consuming and costly to convert images into source code and developers often distracted from focusing on logic and functionality. This review paper presents the existing studies which generate source code from sketches using artificial intelligence and machine learning. In this paper, several studies are evaluated and compared based on different parameters. Their strengths and weaknesses are also discussed in this paper. This review paper will help the researchers and authors working in this area to further improve GUI design process and in development of more accurate systems.
title_zh: 截图生成代码系统综述
abstract_zh: 将截图转换为源代码是用户界面开发自动化过程中的一个重要阶段。目前存在一些基于人工智能的工具，能够理解图像并进一步将其转换为可执行的源代码。通过引入生成式人工智能技术，这些系统的性能得到了进一步提升。基于生成式人工智能的系统在将草图转换为源代码方面表现出较高的准确性。此外，这些系统对开发者大有帮助，因为以往将图像转换为源代码既耗时又昂贵，且开发者常常因此分心，无法专注于逻辑和功能设计。本文综述了现有利用人工智能和机器学习从草图生成源代码的研究工作。论文对多项研究进行了评估与比较，并从不同参数角度分析了它们的优势与不足。本综述论文将有助于该领域的研究人员和作者进一步优化图形用户界面（GUI）设计流程，并推动更精准系统的开发。

title: Automated Incident Management using Infrastructure-as-Code
authors: Niyazi Gökberk Gündüz, Florian Hofer, Eduardo Guerra, Nabil El Ioini, Claus Pahl
abstract: Enterprises that manage their cloud systems through Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) often push dozens of changes every day. Human operators create a bottleneck in managing incidents in these rapidly changing systems: incident post-mortems reveal detection latencies of tens of minutes and manual recoveries that stretch into hours. An autonomous controller is presented that provides reliable incident self-healing in a Development and Operations (DevOps) environment. This self-healing controller architecture instantiates a common autonomic computing pattern. It provides end-to-end, rule-driven self-healing for an IaC pipeline without the need for specialized hardware or proprietary IT operation platforms. It contributes to handling infrastructure incidents in a reliable and automated fashion.
title_zh: 使用基础设施即代码实现自动化事件管理
abstract_zh: 通过基础设施即代码（Infrastructure-as-Code, IaC）管理其云系统的公司，每天通常会推送数十次变更。在这些快速变化的系统中，人工操作员成为管理事件的瓶颈：事件事后分析显示，检测延迟可达数十分钟，而手动恢复则可能持续数小时。本文提出了一种自主控制器，可在开发运维（DevOps）环境中实现可靠的事件自动修复。该自愈控制器架构采用了一种通用的自适应计算模式，能够在无需专用硬件或专有IT运维平台的情况下，为IaC流水线提供端到端、规则驱动的自愈能力。该方案有助于以可靠且自动化的方式处理基础设施事件。

title: AI-Based Framework for Signal Integrity Analysis and Design Optimization in High-Speed Systems
authors: Ravi Sekhar Kommuri
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Emerging Trends in Computing and Communication (ETCOM)
abstract: The paper presents a framework of artificial intelligence to be used to analyze signal integrity and optimize the design of high-speed systems. The suggested methodology uses hybrid neural networks in prediction of key SI parameters, and it is found to scale to 200 folds faster than standard electromagnetic simulations and still maintain accuracy at 2% of full wave accuracy. The framework combines to use of the reinforcement learning to optimize the placement of the components, convolutional neural networks to analyze the eye diagrams in real-time. It has been shown to be <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{3 5}$</tex> percent faster in crosstalk; <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{2 8}$</tex> percent faster in jitter and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{4 2}$</tex> percent faster in design convergence, when validated against PCIE 6.0 and DDR5 interfaces. The given AI-based solution enables the active SI avoidance regarding various high-speed standards, which makes it a potentially transformative solution to the next-generation electronic design.
title_zh: 基于人工智能的高速系统信号完整性分析与设计优化框架
abstract_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于人工智能的框架，用于分析信号完整性并优化高速系统的设计。所提出的方法采用混合神经网络来预测关键的信号完整性（SI）参数，其计算速度比传统的电磁仿真快200倍，同时仍保持与全波仿真精度相差仅2%的高水平。该框架结合了强化学习以优化元器件布局，并利用卷积神经网络实现实时眼图分析。经验证，相较于PCIe 6.0和DDR5接口，该方法在串扰方面提速35%，在抖动方面提速28%，在设计收敛方面提速42%。这一基于人工智能的解决方案能够主动规避多种高速标准下的信号完整性问题，有望成为下一代电子设计中具有变革性意义的技术。

title: A Hardware-Optimized and Secure Variant of the Lightweight Encryption Algorithm for IoT Applications
authors: Sara Abdulrazzaq Badi, Huda A. Rasool Mohammed, Abdulla Ali Abdulla, Mohammed AlAsad, Aref Al-Qattan, Wael Elmedany
publish: 2025 International Conference on Innovation and Intelligence for Informatics, Computing, and Technologies (3ICT)
abstract: The rapid expansion of the Internet of Things (IoT) across domains such as smart homes, healthcare, and industrial automation has intensified the need for secure yet efficient cryptography on resource-constrained devices. This paper focuses on enhancing the Lightweight Encryption Algorithm (LEA) to increase both its security and efficiency for IoT environments. We first outline key IoT security challenges and position LEA among conventional and lightweight ciphers. Although LEA is attractive for constrained devices due to its ARX (Addition-Rotation-XOR) structure and low resource consumption, it remains vulnerable to side-channel analysis, key recovery attacks, and limited resistance against advanced cryptanalytic techniques. To address these limitations, we propose architectural enhancements to LEA, including modifications to the key schedule, the integration of non-linear S-boxes, and hardware-oriented optimizations such as pipelining and parallel processing. The designs are implemented and evaluated using VHDL on Intel® Quartus® Prime and simulated using ModelSim. We compare the original and enhanced LEA implementations in terms of logic resource usage, fan-out, and structural complexity, and discuss the associated security-performance trade-offs. Results demonstrate that the enhanced LEA significantly improves resistance to differential and linear cryptanalysis, with acceptable overhead for moderately constrained IoT devices. The findings highlight that carefully optimized lightweight ciphers can provide stronger security without sacrificing practicality in real-world IoT deployments.
title_zh: 面向物联网应用的硬件优化且安全的轻量级加密算法变体
abstract_zh: 物联网（IoT）在智能家居、医疗健康和工业自动化等领域的迅速扩展，加剧了对资源受限设备上安全且高效的密码学技术的需求。本文聚焦于提升轻量级加密算法（LEA）的安全性与效率，以更好地适应物联网环境。首先，我们概述了物联网安全面临的关键挑战，并将LEA置于传统加密算法与轻量级密码算法的对比框架中。尽管LEA因其ARX（加法-旋转-XOR）结构和低资源消耗特性，对资源受限设备具有吸引力，但其仍易受侧信道分析、密钥恢复攻击以及对高级密码分析技术的有限抵抗能力影响。为解决这些局限性，我们提出对LEA进行架构优化，包括改进密钥调度机制、引入非线性S盒，以及采用流水线化和并行处理等面向硬件的优化策略。相关设计使用VHDL在Intel® Quartus® Prime平台上实现，并通过ModelSim进行仿真验证。我们从逻辑资源占用、扇出（fan-out）及结构复杂度等方面，对比分析了原始版本与增强版LEA的实现性能，并探讨了安全性与性能之间的权衡关系。结果表明，改进后的LEA在抵御差分与线性密码分析方面有显著提升，同时对中等资源受限的物联网设备而言，开销可接受。研究结果表明，经过精心优化的轻量级密码算法能够在不牺牲实际应用可行性的前提下，提供更强的安全保障，适用于真实世界中的物联网部署。

title: Optimizing Prompt Engineering for Large Language Model-Based AI Systems
authors: Naga Sai Mrunal Vuppala, Kishore Subramanya Hebbar, Vishal Sharma, Vandana Roy
publish: 2025 IEEE 1st International Conference on Smart Innovations in Systems, Infrastructure, Mechanical, Power, AI and Computing Technologies (SISIMPACT)
abstract: The advent of large language models (LLMs) may have been a sudden increase in the use, which undoubtedly may intensify the hurry in promoting the precocious and accidental engineering of these models to enhance their accuracy, reliability, and ability to respond to specific contexts. With increased efficiency in different applications and reduced cheating with increased accuracy of performance, the AI systems will finally realise timely plans optimisation. In response to these problems, this study is devoted to the development of effective structure on the principles of automatic tuning prompts, reinforcement learning and passage embedding to the high-quality response as well as to the motivating stimulus to the effective cost of computing power. The integration of cognition together with flexible feedback chains make it possible to respond and understand various demands. There is also evaluation metrics scaling anticipated to evaluate the degree of timeliness-based optimization in terms of relevance, efficiency, and practicality. The strategy is also aimed at decreasing the consumption of energy in turning internationally as per the requirements of designing AI in a sustainable manner. The framework is also more adapt to and more responsive, in comparison with traditional methods, because of comparative validation. With these reactions seeming to suggest the feasibility of streamline the scenario of prompt engineering to redraw the human-AI engagement, and to enable the future smart infrastructures in the form of the LLC-based practices capable of working with the particularly elevated degree of transparency, scale-ability, and domain sustainability. The suggested system resulted in higher performance because it did higher than other methods where the highest degree of accuracy of 95% was through semantic clarity and the lowest at 93% through contextual accuracy.
title_zh: 针对基于大语言模型的人工智能系统的提示工程优化
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的出现可能引发了使用量的突然增长，这无疑加剧了在提升模型准确性、可靠性和特定情境响应能力方面追求快速推进和偶然性工程的趋势。随着不同应用场景中效率的提高以及性能准确性的增强，作弊行为减少，人工智能系统最终将实现计划的及时优化。针对这些问题，本研究致力于基于自动调优提示、强化学习与段落嵌入原理，构建有效结构，以生成高质量响应，并激发计算资源利用效率的提升。认知与灵活反馈链的融合，使系统能够更好地响应并理解多样化需求。同时，预期将采用可扩展的评估指标体系，从相关性、效率和实用性等方面衡量基于时效性的优化程度。该策略还旨在降低能源消耗，符合可持续设计人工智能的要求。相较于传统方法，该框架更具适应性和响应性，这一点通过对比验证得到了证实。这些反应似乎表明，简化提示工程场景、重塑人机互动模式成为可能，从而为未来基于LLC（大语言模型）的智能基础设施建设铺平道路，使其具备更高的透明度、可扩展性及领域可持续性。所提出的系统表现更优，其最高准确率达到95%，源于语义清晰度；最低准确率为93%，则得益于上下文准确性。

title: NPX: Automating Neuromorphic Processor Design from Spike-Based Learning to FPGA Prototyping
authors: Kyuseung Han, Hyeonguk Jang, Sukho Lee, Sung-Eun Kim, Kyudong Hwang, Jae-Jin Lee
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: Neuromorphic Processor eXpress (NPX) is a framework designed to facilitate the development of lightweight neuromorphic processors. To evaluate its efficacy, we conducted a case study involving the FPGA-based implementation of a traffic sign recognition system using an NPX-generated neuromorphic processor. The prototype integrates camera input and OLED output, successfully demonstrating full functionality. This case study confirms that NPX substantially streamlines the design and deployment of efficient neuromorphic processors for embedded artificial intelligence applications.
title_zh: NPX：从基于脉冲的学习到FPGA原型设计的类脑处理器自动化设计
abstract_zh: 神经形态处理器表达（NPX）是一个旨在促进轻量级神经形态处理器开发的框架。为评估其有效性，我们开展了一项案例研究，通过NPX生成的神经形态处理器，在FPGA上实现了交通标志识别系统。该原型集成了摄像头输入和OLED输出，成功展示了完整的功能。该案例研究证实，NPX显著简化了高效神经形态处理器的设计与部署过程，适用于嵌入式人工智能应用。

title: Compile in Seconds and Run on an FPGA with DynaRapid
authors: Andrea Guerrieri, Isaac John Wetenkamp, Chris Lavin, Eddie Hung, Lana Josipović, Paolo Ienne
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: FPGAs are highly versatile devices, but their backend compilation process is significantly time-consuming. While software code compilation may take just a few seconds, FPGA compilation times can often span from several minutes to hours due to the complexity of the underlying toolchain and the ever-growing device capacity. DynaRapid <sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup> is a very fast compilation methodology that generates, in a matter of seconds, placed-and-routed kernel designs for AMD FPGAs [1] The DynaRapid workflow is illustrated in Figure 1.
title_zh: 数秒内完成编译，并在FPGA上使用DynaRapid运行
abstract_zh: FPGAs 是一种高度灵活的器件，但其后端编译过程却非常耗时。与软件代码编译仅需几秒钟不同，FPGA 的编译时间通常从几分钟到数小时不等，这主要是由于底层工具链的复杂性以及器件容量的持续增长所致。DynaRapid<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup> 是一种极快的编译方法，能够在短短几秒内为 AMD FPGA 生成已布局布线的核设计[1]。DynaRapid 的工作流程如图 1 所示。

title: Automated I.T Ops: Comprehensive Review of IaC Technology
authors: Yugansh Garg, Divya Jain, Shivangee Nagar, Riya Solanki
publish: 2025 IEEE 1st International Conference on Smart Innovations in Systems, Infrastructure, Mechanical, Power, AI and Computing Technologies (SISIMPACT)
abstract: Infrastructure as Code (IaC) has changed how cloud infrastructure is built and maintained, moving away from manual setup toward automated processes defined in code. By writing infrastructure specifications in a codified form, teams can reduce configuration errors, speed up deployment, and make systems easier to reproduce. In this study, IaC is reviewed in the broader setting of cloud computing, with attention to its main principles, common tools, and the challenges that appear in real-world use. Both declarative and imperative styles are discussed, drawing on recent literature, alongside examples of popular tools such as Terraform, AWS CloudFormation, and Ansible. These are examined for provisioning resources and managing configurations. They also handle orchestration across multiple cloud platforms. The comparison considers scalability, DevOps workflow integration, and security. Results show Terraform's strength in multi-cloud deployments. They highlight why security is vital in IaC practices. This is especially important in a DevSecOps approach. It helps practitioners and researchers make infrastructure automated and secure.
title_zh: 自动化IT运维：IaC技术全面综述
abstract_zh: 基础设施即代码（IaC）改变了云基础设施的构建与维护方式，使人们从手动配置转向通过代码定义的自动化流程。通过以代码形式编写基础设施规范，团队能够减少配置错误、加快部署速度，并使系统更易于复现。本研究在云计算的大背景下对IaC进行了综述，重点关注其核心原则、常用工具以及实际应用中出现的挑战。文章讨论了声明式与命令式两种风格，结合最新文献，并以Terraform、AWS CloudFormation和Ansible等流行工具为例，分析其在资源编排和配置管理方面的应用，以及跨多个云平台的协同能力。比较涵盖了可扩展性、DevOps工作流集成和安全性等方面。研究结果表明，Terraform在多云部署方面具有显著优势，同时强调了安全在IaC实践中的重要性，尤其是在DevSecOps方法论中。这有助于从业者和研究人员实现基础设施的自动化与安全化。

title: Developing an Advanced Cross layer Distributed Model for Enhanced Attack Detection Model
authors: Smriti Singhatia, Madhavi Dhingra
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Recent Trends in Electrical, Electronics and Computing Technologies (ICRTEECT)
abstract: The increasing interconnectivity of digital ecosystems such as the Internet of Things (IoT), Industry 5.0, and smart grids has led to a surge in sophisticated, distributed, and multi-vector cyber-attacks. Conventional intrusion detection systems (IDS), constrained by single-layer analysis and centralized architectures, are inadequate in addressing these evolving security challenges.This study presents a novel Advanced Cross-Layer Distributed Intrusion Detection Model (ACLD-IDM) that integrates federated learning with an attention-based deep learning mechanism to enable real-time, privacy-preserving, and cooperative threat detection. The proposed model introduces a cross-layer feature fusion strategy that correlates traffic data across the physical, network, and application layers, thereby uncovering hidden attack patterns that traditional single-layer systems often overlook. The ACLD-IDM employs hybrid artificial intelligence (AI) techniques, including recurrent neural networks (RNNs), long short-term memory (LSTM) networks, graph neural networks (GNNs), and Transformer architectures, to enhance detection accuracy, scalability, and resilience in heterogeneous and resource-constrained environments. Evaluation on benchmark datasets—NSL-KDD, CICIDS2017, and UNSW-NB15— demonstrates the model’s superior adaptability to zero-day and multi-vector attacks while maintaining strong privacy preservation through decentralized federated learning. The novelty of this research lies in its fusion of cross-layer analytics, decentralized intelligence, and attention-based adaptive learning, establishing a robust foundation for next-generation, intelligent, and self-sustaining cybersecurity frameworks capable of defending complex digital infrastructures against emerging threats
title_zh: 开发一种先进的跨层分布式模型以增强攻击检测能力
abstract_zh: 随着物联网（IoT）、工业5.0和智能电网等数字生态系统的互联互通日益增强，复杂、分布式且多向量的网络攻击呈爆发式增长。传统的入侵检测系统（IDS）由于受限于单层分析和集中式架构，在应对这些不断演进的安全挑战时已显得力不从心。本研究提出一种新型的高级跨层分布式入侵检测模型（ACLD-IDM），该模型融合联邦学习与基于注意力机制的深度学习技术，实现了实时、隐私保护且协同高效的威胁检测。所提出的模型引入了一种跨层特征融合策略，能够关联物理层、网络层和应用层之间的流量数据，从而发现传统单层系统常忽略的隐蔽攻击模式。ACLD-IDM采用混合人工智能（AI）技术，包括循环神经网络（RNN）、长短期记忆网络（LSTM）、图神经网络（GNN）以及Transformer架构，显著提升了在异构且资源受限环境中的检测精度、可扩展性与系统韧性。在NSL-KDD、CICIDS2017和UNSW-NB15等基准数据集上的评估结果表明，该模型不仅对零日攻击和多向量攻击表现出卓越的适应能力，还通过去中心化的联邦学习机制有效保障了隐私安全。本研究的创新之处在于将跨层分析、去中心化智能与基于注意力的自适应学习相融合，为下一代智能、自维持的网络安全框架奠定了坚实基础，使其能够有效防御日益复杂的数字基础设施所面临的新兴威胁。

title: Design of Intelligent Report Automatic Generation System and Optimization of Generative Algorithm in Power Business Scenarios
authors: Li Chen, Hao Yang, Juntai Shi, Yixuan Chen, Xunquan Lu
publish: 2025 2nd International Seminar on Artificial Intelligence, Computer Technology and Control Engineering (ACTCE)
abstract: The digital transformation of power industry challenges the value mining of massive data, and the traditional report generation mode is inefficient and difficult to meet the professional and real-time requirements. In this paper, an intelligent automatic report generation system driven by business rules and optimized by generative algorithm is proposed to solve the problems of low efficiency, poor accuracy and poor readability of report generation in power scene. The system architecture is divided into a data fusion layer, a business rule layer, an intelligent generation layer, and an application interaction layer. A dynamic template engine is constructed through a knowledge graph, and combined with a rule engine and a domain fine tuned Large Language Model (LLM) to achieve automatic generation, verification, and optimization of reports. The experimental results show that the system can significantly improve the efficiency of report generation, reduce error rates, and support human-machine collaboration, providing an effective tool for the digital transformation of the power industry.
title_zh: 电力业务场景下智能报告自动生成系统设计与生成算法优化
abstract_zh: 电力行业数字化转型对海量数据的价值挖掘提出了新挑战，传统报表生成模式效率低下，难以满足专业性与实时性的要求。本文提出一种基于业务规则驱动、并由生成式算法优化的智能自动报表生成系统，以解决电力场景下报表生成效率低、准确率差、可读性弱等问题。该系统架构分为数据融合层、业务规则层、智能生成层和应用交互层。通过知识图谱构建动态模板引擎，并结合规则引擎与领域微调的大语言模型（LLM），实现报表的自动生成功能，同时支持校验与优化。实验结果表明，该系统显著提升了报表生成效率，降低了出错率，支持人机协同，为电力行业的数字化转型提供了有效工具。

title: AI-Driven Formal Verification for Efficient and Scalable Design Validation
authors: Aparna Mohan, Sivakumar Karuppiah, Uday Ashokbhai Korat
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Recent Trends in Electrical, Electronics and Computing Technologies (ICRTEECT)
abstract: As modern hardware and software designs grow increasingly complex, traditional formal verification techniques face critical challenges, including state space explosion and excessive computational cost, limiting their practical application in large-scale systems. This paper introduces a novel AI-driven formal verification framework that leverages machine learning models to intelligently guide and optimize the verification process. By predicting critical state exploration paths and automatically generating invariants, our approach significantly reduces the verification time and memory usage compared to conventional methods. We integrate a reinforcement learning agent with symbolic model checking, enabling adaptive decision-making that prioritizes relevant design regions while pruning irrelevant paths. Extensive experiments on benchmark hardware designs demonstrate up to 60% improvement in verification speed and substantial scalability gains without compromising correctness guarantees. The proposed method bridges the gap between rigorous formal guarantees and practical scalability, offering a transformative solution for efficient and automated design validation in the era of complex system development.
title_zh: 基于人工智能的正式验证：实现高效且可扩展的设计验证
abstract_zh: 随着现代软硬件设计日益复杂，传统的形式化验证技术面临着状态空间爆炸和计算成本过高等关键挑战，限制了其在大规模系统中的实际应用。本文提出了一种新型的基于人工智能的形式化验证框架，利用机器学习模型智能引导并优化验证过程。通过预测关键的状态探索路径并自动生成不变式，该方法相较于传统方法显著降低了验证时间和内存占用。我们引入强化学习代理与符号模型检测相结合，实现了自适应决策机制，能够优先关注相关的设计区域，同时剪枝无关路径。在基准硬件设计上的大量实验表明，验证速度最高可提升60%，且在不牺牲正确性保证的前提下实现了显著的可扩展性提升。所提出的方案弥合了严格形式化保证与实际可扩展性之间的差距，为复杂系统开发时代高效、自动化的设计验证提供了一种变革性解决方案。

title: Aspo: Constraint-Aware Bayesian Optimization for Fpga-Based Soft Processors
authors: Haoran Wu, Ce Guo, Wayne Luk, Robert Mullins
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: Bayesian Optimization (BO) has shown promise in tuning processor design parameters. However, standard BO does not support constraints involving categorical parameters such as types of branch predictors and division circuits. In addition, optimization time of BO grows with processor complexity, which becomes increasingly significant especially for FPGA-based soft processors. This paper introduces ASPO, an approach that leverages disjunctive form to enable BO to handle constraints involving categorical parameters. Unlike existing methods that directly apply standard BO, the proposed ASPO method, for the first time, customizes the mathematical mechanism of BO to address challenges faced by soft-processor designs on FPGAs. Specifically, ASPO supports categorical parameters using a novel customized BO covariance kernel. It also accelerates the design evaluation procedure by penalizing the BO acquisition function with potential evaluation time and by reusing FPGA synthesis checkpoints from previously evaluated configurations. ASPO targets three soft processors: RocketChip, BOOM, and EL2 VeeR. The approach is evaluated based on seven RISC-V benchmarks. Results show that ASPO can reduce execution time for the “multiply” benchmark on the BOOM processor by up to 35 % compared to the default configuration. Furthermore, it reduces design time for the BOOM processor by up to 74 % compared to Boomerang, a state-of-the-art hardware-oriented BO approach.
title_zh: Aspo：面向FPGA软处理器的约束感知贝叶斯优化
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化（Bayesian Optimization, BO）在处理器设计参数调优方面展现出巨大潜力。然而，标准的BO方法无法支持涉及类别型参数（如分支预测器类型和除法电路类型）的约束条件。此外，随着处理器复杂度的增加，BO的优化时间也随之增长，这一问题在基于FPGA的软核处理器中尤为显著。本文提出了一种名为ASPO的新方法，通过采用析取形式（disjunctive form），使BO能够处理包含类别型参数的约束。与现有直接应用标准BO的方法不同，ASPO是首次针对FPGA上软核处理器设计所面临的挑战，对BO的数学机制进行定制化改进。具体而言，ASPO引入了一种新颖的、专为类别型参数设计的贝叶斯优化协方差核函数；同时，通过在BO的获取函数中引入潜在评估时间惩罚，并复用先前已评估配置的FPGA综合检查点，显著加速了设计评估过程。ASPO针对三种软核处理器——RocketChip、BOOM和EL2 VeeR进行了实现。实验基于七个RISC-V基准程序进行评估。结果表明，在BOOM处理器上，ASPO将“乘法”基准的执行时间相比默认配置最多降低了35%；同时，与当前最先进的面向硬件的BO方法Boomerang相比，ASPO将BOOM处理器的设计时间最多减少了74%。

title: Leveraging FPGAs for Homomorphic Matrix-Vector Multiplication in Oblivious Message Retrieval
authors: Grant Bosworth, Keewoo Lee, Sunwoong Kim
publish: 2025 59th Asilomar Conference on Signals, Systems, and Computers
abstract: While end-to-end encryption protects the content of messages, it does not secure metadata, which exposes sender and receiver information through traffic analysis. A plausible approach to protecting this metadata is to have senders post encrypted messages on a public bulletin board and receivers scan it for relevant messages. Oblivious message retrieval (OMR) leverages homomorphic encryption (HE) to improve user experience in this solution by delegating the scan to a resource-rich server while preserving privacy. A key process in OMR is the homomorphic detection of pertinent messages for the receiver from the bulletin board. It relies on a specialized matrix-vector multiplication algorithm, which involves extensive multiplications between ciphertext vectors and plaintext matrices, as well as homomorphic rotations. The computationally intensive nature of this process limits the practicality of OMR. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a hardware architecture to accelerate the matrix-vector multiplication algorithm. The building homomorphic operators in this algorithm are implemented using high-level synthesis, with design parameters for different parallelism levels. These operators are then deployed on a field-programmable gate array platform using an efficient design space exploration strategy to accelerate homomorphic matrix-vector multiplication. Compared to a software implementation, the proposed hardware accelerator achieves a ×13.86 speedup.
title_zh: 利用FPGA实现不经意消息检索中的同态矩阵-向量乘法
abstract_zh: 尽管端到端加密保护了消息内容，却无法保障元数据的安全，而元数据可通过流量分析暴露发送者和接收者的信息。一种可行的元数据保护方法是：发送者将加密消息发布在公共公告板上，接收者则定期扫描公告板以查找相关消息。不经意消息检索（OMR）利用同态加密（HE）技术，在此方案中提升了用户体验，通过将扫描任务委托给资源丰富的服务器，同时保持隐私性。OMR中的关键步骤是从公告板中对相关消息进行同态检测。该过程依赖于一种专门的矩阵-向量乘法算法，涉及大量密文向量与明文矩阵之间的乘法运算以及同态旋转操作。由于该过程计算开销巨大，限制了OMR的实际应用。为解决这一挑战，本文提出了一种硬件架构来加速矩阵-向量乘法算法。该算法中的基础同态算子采用高层次综合（HLS）实现，并针对不同并行度设计了可配置参数。随后，通过高效的架构探索策略，将这些算子部署于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）平台，从而加速同态矩阵-向量乘法运算。与软件实现相比，所提出的硬件加速器实现了13.86倍的性能提升。

title: Iterative Floorplan Refinement for Efficient Area Utilization and Reduced Congestion in VLSI Physical Design
authors: P.Kishore, B.Haindavi, V.Priyanka
publish: 2025 IEEE 3rd Global Conference on Wireless Computing and Networking (GCWCN)
abstract: The rapid evolution of Very Large Scale Integration (VLSI) technology has enabled the creation of complex chips and System-on-Chip (SoCs) by integrating billions of transistors within a single integrated circuit. The design of such advanced chips is a lengthy process that involves multiple stages, particularly in the domain of physical design. Physical design converts the Register Transfer Level (RTL) netlist into a manufacturable layout, commonly referred to as a GDS. It involves Floorplan, Powerplan, Placement, Clock tree synthesis, and Routing stages. Among them, floorplanning is a crucial phase, as it influences design performance and manufacturability by addressing congestion and area utilization. This paper focuses on a block-level implementation of an ORCATOP block using 32nm technology. It employs Synopsys’ IC Compiler II tool, using nine metal layers for routing and operating at a maximum frequency of 200 MHz. This study focuses on optimizing the design from the initial floorplan to various placement stages. Initially, the design exhibits severe congestion issues. Upon modifying the floorplan, significant improvements were achieved, particularly in congestion reduction. The results indicate that the iterative approach and a well-optimized floorplan highlight the significant reduction in congestion while achieving better utilization of the area by improving the overall design efficiency.
title_zh: 用于VLSI物理设计中高效面积利用与降低拥塞的迭代版图优化方法
abstract_zh:
超大规模集成电路（VLSI）技术的快速发展，使得在单个集成电路中集成数十亿个晶体管成为可能，从而实现了复杂芯片及系统级芯片（SoC）的制造。这类先进芯片的设计是一个耗时较长的过程，尤其在物理设计领域涉及多个阶段。物理设计将寄存器传输级（RTL）网表转换为可制造的版图，通常称为GDS。该过程包括布局规划（Floorplan）、电源规划（Powerplan）、单元放置（Placement）、时钟树综合（Clock tree synthesis）以及布线（Routing）等步骤。其中，布局规划是关键环节，因为它通过解决拥塞和面积利用率问题，直接影响设计的性能与可制造性。

本文聚焦于采用32nm工艺实现ORCATOP模块的块级设计。设计使用Synopsys IC Compiler II工具，采用九层金属进行布线，并在最高200 MHz的工作频率下运行。本研究重点优化从初始布局规划到多个放置阶段的设计流程。最初，设计存在严重的拥塞问题。通过调整布局规划方案后，取得了显著改善，尤其是在降低拥塞方面效果明显。结果表明，采用迭代优化方法并结合精心设计的布局规划，能够有效减少拥塞，同时提升面积利用率，从而全面提高设计效率。

title: Llm-Fuzz: Adaptive, Structure-Aware Fuzzing of Javascript Engines with Large Language Models
authors: Kongyang Liu, Chengxiang Tan
publish: 2025 11th International Conference on Computer and Communications (ICCC)
abstract: Fuzzing modern JavaScript (JS) engines remains challenging due to the semantic complexity required to explore deep program states and advanced components such as Just-InTime (JIT) compilers. Traditional mutation-based fuzzers often generate invalid inputs, while existing structure-aware techniques still face a semantic wall, producing syntactically valid but semantically flawed programs. This paper presents LLM-Fuzz, a coverage-guided fuzzing framework that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to perform AST-based, semantics-aware mutations. Unlike prior fuzzers with fixed operators, LLM-Fuzz introduces an adaptive feedback loop that fine-tunes the mutation strategy during fuzzing via Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Experiments on V8 and ChakraCore show that LLM-Fuzz reduces runtime error rates and achieves higher edge coverage compared to state-of-the-art fuzzers. These results demonstrate that incampaign, LLM-driven adaptation can improve the effectiveness of fuzzing structured inputs.
title_zh: LLM-Fuzz：基于大型语言模型的自适应、结构感知的JavaScript引擎模糊测试
abstract_zh: 现代 JavaScript（JS）引擎的模糊测试仍然充满挑战，原因在于其需要复杂的语义知识来探索深层程序状态以及诸如即时编译器（JIT）等高级组件。传统的基于变异的模糊测试工具常常生成无效输入，而现有的结构感知技术仍面临语义瓶颈，生成的程序虽然语法正确，但语义上存在缺陷。本文提出 LLM-Fuzz，一种基于覆盖率引导的模糊测试框架，利用大型语言模型（LLM）实现基于抽象语法树（AST）的、具备语义感知能力的变异操作。与以往采用固定变异算子的模糊测试工具不同，LLM-Fuzz 引入了一种自适应反馈机制，通过低秩适配（LoRA）在模糊测试过程中动态优化变异策略。在 V8 和 ChakraCore 上的实验表明，LLM-Fuzz 相较于当前最先进的模糊测试工具，显著降低了运行时错误率，并实现了更高的边覆盖率。这些结果表明，在模糊测试过程中引入基于 LLM 的自适应能力，能够有效提升对结构化输入的测试效果。

title: Maximizing Resource Utilization for Stencil Computing
authors: Pedro Henrique Rosso, Guido Araujo
publish: 2025 35th International Conference on Field-Programmable Logic and Applications (FPL)
abstract: Developing FPGA applications, either using RTL or HLS, requires knowledge about the platform on which the application will be deployed. The availability of resources changes according to each FPGA model. To deal with this, the components of applications may be implemented using different primitives. For example, Floating-Point operations can be implemented using Flip-Flops and Look-up Tables, or with the addition of DSP units, the same happens for other components, such as FIFOs. During development, the implementation of the components is often chosen and used for the rest of the design. Using Integer Programming, this work explores how different floating-point implementations can be mixed to achieve performance optimization in a stencil application. Furthermore, it discusses how the same idea can be used for other components and applications.
title_zh: 最大化资源利用率的模板计算
abstract_zh: 在开发FPGA应用程序时，无论是使用RTL（寄存器传输级）还是HLS（高层次综合），都需要了解目标部署平台的特性。不同FPGA型号所具备的资源各不相同，因此必须根据具体硬件条件来选择合适的实现方式。为了应对这一挑战，应用程序中的各个组件可以采用不同的基本单元进行实现。例如，浮点运算可以通过触发器（Flip-Flops）和查找表（Look-up Tables）来实现，也可以借助DSP单元来完成；同样地，其他组件如FIFO也存在多种实现方式。在开发过程中，通常会选定一种特定的实现方案并贯穿整个设计过程。本文利用整数规划（Integer Programming）方法，研究如何在分块计算（stencil）应用中混合使用不同的浮点实现方式，以达到性能优化的目的。此外，文章还探讨了该思路在其他组件及应用场景中的可扩展性与适用性。

title: AI Copilots for Machine Learning Pipelines: A Comparative Study on Code Quality and Model Performance
authors: Nikos Flamourtzoglou, Eleni Vrochidou, George A. Papakostas
publish: 2025 International Conference on Innovation and Intelligence for Informatics, Computing, and Technologies (3ICT)
abstract: As Artificial Intelligence (AI) continues to reshape, among others, the field of software development, its integration into coding workflows opens up both opportunities and critical questions. The rise of AI-powered coding assistants has introduced a paradigm shift in the way developers approximate programming tasks. This work aims to investigate the efficacy and quality of AI-powered coding in the development of end-to-end machine learning pipelines. More specifically, a comparative study of Amazon Q, GitHub Copilot, Windsurf and Gemini is conducted, by developing two machine learning pipelines, for customer churn prediction and Titanic survival prediction. Each assistant was prompted with the same instructions towards a fair evaluation, and their outputs were assessed using static and dynamic code analysis tools, such as Pylint, Radon, SonarQube and MLflow. The evaluation is focused on code quality, model performance, feature importance, explainability and fairness. Our findings provide practical insights into the coding assistants' strengths and limitations, offering guidance for developers and researchers for the selection of the appropriate tool for machine learning tasks.
title_zh: 机器学习流水线中的AI协作工具：代码质量与模型性能的比较研究
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能（AI）持续重塑软件开发等领域，其在编码工作流中的集成既带来了机遇，也引发了一系列关键问题。AI编程助手的兴起，正在改变开发者完成编程任务的方式，带来范式转变。本文旨在研究AI驱动编程在端到端机器学习流水线开发中的有效性与质量。具体而言，通过构建两个机器学习流水线——客户流失预测和泰坦尼克号生存预测，对Amazon Q、GitHub Copilot、Windsurf和Gemini四款AI编程助手进行对比研究。所有助手均使用相同的指令进行测试，以确保评估的公平性，并采用Pylint、Radon、SonarQube和MLflow等静态与动态代码分析工具对输出结果进行评估。评估重点涵盖代码质量、模型性能、特征重要性、可解释性以及公平性。研究结果为各类编程助手的优势与局限提供了实用洞见，为开发者和研究人员在选择适用于机器学习任务的工具时提供了有益指导。

title: High Level Synthesis Design for Soft-Input GRAND
authors: Tuomas Aaltonen, Mikko Valkama, Syed Mohsin Abbas
publish: 2025 59th Asilomar Conference on Signals, Systems, and Computers
abstract: Guessing Random Additive Noise Decoding (GRAND) is a universal channel code decoder for short linear block codes. GRAND can be implemented efficiently on hardware and features both hard-input and soft-input variants. Hardware implementations based on GRAND range from those that employ sequential error pattern generation to reduce resource consumption at the expense of higher decoding latency to those that employ parallel error pattern generation to reduce decoding latency at the expense of higher resource utilization. In this work, we present a soft-input Ordered Reliability Bits GRAND (ORBGRAND) hardware implementation framework based on High-Level Synthesis (HLS). The proposed HLS-based methodology simplifies Design Space Exploration (DSE) for ORBGRAND hardware implementations targeted at applications with varying constraints on decoding latency and resource utilization. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first-of-its-kind HLS-based soft-input ORBGRAND hardware implementation framework, and the source code for the proposed framework is provided under a permissive open-source license.
title_zh: 软输入GRAND的高层次综合设计
abstract_zh: 猜测随机加性噪声解码（GRAND）是一种适用于短长度线性分组码的通用信道编码译码器。GRAND可在硬件上高效实现，并具备硬输入和软输入两种变体。基于GRAND的硬件实现方式从采用顺序生成错误模式以降低资源消耗但增加解码延迟，到采用并行生成错误模式以减少解码延迟但增加资源占用，涵盖了多种设计选择。在本研究中，我们提出了一种基于高层次综合（HLS）的软输入有序可靠性比特GRAND（ORBGRAND）硬件实现框架。所提出的基于HLS的方法论简化了针对不同解码延迟与资源利用率约束的应用场景下ORBGRAND硬件实现的设计空间探索（DSE）。据我们所知，这是首个基于HLS的软输入ORBGRAND硬件实现框架，且本文提出的框架源代码已按照宽松的开源许可证提供。

title: An Example-Enhanced and Iteratively Refined Text-to-SQL Framework with Dual-Path Revision
authors: Yanling Chen, Zupei Huang, Zijun Lu, Yaoyao Dai, Yidong Ke, Lin Zhou
publish: 2025 11th International Conference on Computer and Communications (ICCC)
abstract: Although significant progress has been made in Text-to-SQL technology, existing methods still face challenges: insufficient adaptability between examples and the specific database schema, and inadequate repair capabilities when SQL execution encounters exceptions. To address these challenges, this paper introduces the Example-Enhanced and Iteratively Refined SQL (EEIR-SQL) framework, featuring two key innovations: First, a dynamic example generator produces SQL examples covering varying levels of complexity for each query task. Second, a dual-path intelligent revision agent autonomously selects SQL correction strategies based on execution feedback (error reports or empty results). Experiments on the BIRD benchmark demonstrate that EEIR-SQL's 4-bit (INT4) quantized Qwen332B model achieves an 11.43 percentage points higher execution accuracy than the Qwen3-32B-Q4 baseline, outperforming several GPT-4-based approaches. This result not only validates EEIR-SQL's effectiveness in generating accurate and reliable SQL, but also demonstrates that, despite using a less resourceintensive quantized model, its performance surpasses that of computationally demanding GPT-4. This provides practical guidance for balancing low-resource deployment with high reliability requirements.
title_zh: 一种示例增强且迭代优化的文本到SQL框架及其双路径修订机制
abstract_zh: 尽管文本到SQL技术已取得显著进展，现有方法仍面临两大挑战：示例与特定数据库模式之间的适应性不足，以及在SQL执行出现异常时修复能力有限。为应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种示例增强且迭代优化的SQL生成框架——EEIR-SQL，其包含两项关键创新：首先，动态示例生成器能够为每个查询任务生成涵盖不同复杂度水平的SQL示例；其次，双路径智能修正代理可根据执行反馈（错误报告或空结果）自主选择SQL修正策略。在BIRD基准测试上的实验表明，EEIR-SQL所采用的4比特（INT4）量化版Qwen3-32B模型，在执行准确率上比Qwen3-32B-Q4基线高出11.43个百分点，优于多种基于GPT-4的方法。这一结果不仅验证了EEIR-SQL在生成准确可靠SQL方面的有效性，更表明即使使用资源消耗较低的量化模型，其性能仍可超越计算开销巨大的GPT-4。这为在低资源部署与高可靠性需求之间实现平衡提供了切实可行的指导。

title: Research on Retrieval-Augmented Generation Method Based on Dynamic Knowledge Indexing and Semantic Alignment Optimization
authors: Yang Shao, Ziliang Du, Bo Liu, Hao Wen, Xilin Zhang, Chaofan Zhang
publish: 2026 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Social Network Systems (AISNS)
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) face significant challenges in knowledge-intensive tasks, including knowledge solidification, insufficient timeliness, and hallucination generation. To address these challenges, this study proposes an innovative retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) method based on dynamic knowledge indexing and semantic alignment optimization. However, traditional RAG methods suffer from semantic fragmentation and query-knowledge misalignment. The approach constructs a dynamic multi-granularity knowledge indexing system and integrates an intelligent dual-path routing decision mechanism to achieve efficient collaboration between knowledge retrieval and generation processes. Key innovations include: (1) a dynamic multi-granularity (comprising lexical-level inverted indexing and semantic-level vector indexing) knowledge indexing architecture that employs an adaptive chunking algorithm based on semantic coherence analysis to resolve semantic fragmentation caused by fixed-length segmentation; (2) a prompt engineering-driven semantic alignment optimization mechanism that unifies the semantic space of queries and knowledge bases by generating hypothetical question-answer pairs, significantly improving retrieval accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate significant improvements: 37.01 EM and 47.53 F1 on HotpotQA, 35.12 EM and 45.69 F1 on SQuAD. This work provides a reliable technical solution for intelligent question answering and advances RAG technology in semantic understanding and retrieval accuracy.
title_zh: 基于动态知识索引与语义对齐优化的检索增强生成方法研究
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在知识密集型任务中面临诸多挑战，包括知识固化困难、时效性不足以及幻觉生成等问题。为应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种基于动态知识索引与语义对齐优化的创新检索增强生成（RAG）方法。然而，传统RAG方法普遍存在语义碎片化和查询-知识错位的问题。本方法构建了动态多粒度知识索引体系，并引入智能双路径路由决策机制，实现了知识检索与生成过程之间的高效协同。主要创新点包括：（1）一种动态多粒度知识索引架构，涵盖词法级倒排索引与语义级向量索引，采用基于语义连贯性分析的自适应分块算法，有效解决因固定长度切分导致的语义碎片化问题；（2）一种由提示工程驱动的语义对齐优化机制，通过生成假设性问答对统一查询与知识库的语义空间，显著提升检索准确率。实验结果表明，该方法在HotpotQA数据集上取得37.01的EM值和47.53的F1值，在SQuAD数据集上达到35.12的EM值和45.69的F1值。本研究为智能问答系统提供了可靠的技术方案，推动了RAG技术在语义理解与检索精度方面的进步。

title: SecureCodeReviewer: An AI-Driven Automated Secure Code Review System with Context-Aware Vulnerability Detection
authors: Dhanush MC, Sandeep Kumar TV, Mohan Krishna G, Keerthika T
publish: 2026 5th International Conference on Communication, Computing and Electronics Systems (ICCCES)
abstract: This survey examines the use of AI and machine learning in software vulnerability detection. As software becomes more advanced and complicated over the days cyber-attacks get more sophisticated and advanced, so this has become a problem, this survey examines deep learning methods like CNN, RNN & BiLSTMs, transformers like BERT and all its variations, it also examines graph-based methods like GGNNs and HAGNNs, and conventional ML methods. Key datasets include SARD, NVD, Debian Linus repositories, and Python-specific datasets have been used and examined for their advantages and disadvantages. By comparing performance metrics including accuracy, F1-score, recall, precision, and ROC, reliability is evaluated. To promote secure engineering methods, the study indicates future prospects for multimodal learning, cross-language transfer, federated learning, and integration with software pipelines. It also addresses long-standing challenges such as language reliance, dataset bias, scalability, and explainability.
title_zh: SecureCodeReviewer：一种基于人工智能的自动化安全代码审查系统，具备上下文感知的漏洞检测能力
abstract_zh: 本调查研究了人工智能与机器学习在软件漏洞检测中的应用。随着软件日益复杂和先进，网络攻击也变得愈发 sophisticated 和高级，这一问题日益突出。本调查重点分析了深度学习方法，如卷积神经网络（CNN）、循环神经网络（RNN）及双向长短期记忆网络（BiLSTM），以及基于Transformer的模型，如BERT及其各种变体；同时考察了图神经网络方法，如图图神经网络（GGNN）和层次化图神经网络（HAGNN），以及传统的机器学习方法。研究中使用并评估了多个关键数据集，包括SARD、NVD、Debian Linus代码仓库，以及针对Python语言的特定数据集，分析其各自的优缺点。通过对比准确率、F1分数、召回率、精确率和ROC等性能指标，对模型的可靠性进行了评估。为推动安全工程实践，研究指出了未来的发展方向，包括多模态学习、跨语言迁移学习、联邦学习，以及与软件开发流程的集成。此外，研究还探讨了长期存在的挑战，如对编程语言的依赖性、数据集偏差、可扩展性以及模型可解释性等问题。

title: Developing an Advanced Cross layer Distributed Model for Enhanced Attack Detection Model
authors: Smriti Singhatia, Madhavi Dhingra
publish: 2025 2nd International Conference on Recent Trends in Electrical, Electronics and Computing Technologies (ICRTEECT)
abstract: The increasing interconnectivity of digital ecosystems such as the Internet of Things (IoT), Industry 5.0, and smart grids has led to a surge in sophisticated, distributed, and multi-vector cyber-attacks. Conventional intrusion detection systems (IDS), constrained by single-layer analysis and centralized architectures, are inadequate in addressing these evolving security challenges. This study presents a novel Advanced Cross-Layer Distributed Intrusion Detection Model (ACLD-IDM) that integrates federated learning with an attention-based deep learning mechanism to enable real-time, privacy-preserving, and cooperative threat detection. The proposed model introduces a cross-layer feature fusion strategy that correlates traffic data across the physical, network, and application layers, thereby uncovering hidden attack patterns that traditional single-layer systems often overlook. The ACLD-IDM employs hybrid artificial intelligence (AI) techniques, including recurrent neural networks (RNNs), long short-term memory (LSTM) networks, graph neural networks (GNNs), and Transformer architectures, to enhance detection accuracy, scalability, and resilience in heterogeneous and resource-constrained environments. Evaluation on benchmark datasets—NSL-KDD, CICIDS2017, and UNSW-NB15—demonstrates the model’s superior adaptability to zero-day and multi-vector attacks while maintaining strong privacy preservation through decentralized federated learning. The novelty of this research lies in its fusion of cross-layer analytics, decentralized intelligence, and attention-based adaptive learning, establishing a robust foundation for next-generation, intelligent, and self-sustaining cybersecurity frameworks capable of defending complex digital infrastructures against emerging threats
title_zh: 开发一种先进的跨层分布式模型以增强攻击检测能力
abstract_zh: 随着物联网（IoT）、工业5.0和智能电网等数字生态系统的互联互通日益增强，复杂、分布式且多向量的网络攻击呈爆发式增长。传统入侵检测系统（IDS）受限于单层分析和集中式架构，在应对这些不断演化的安全挑战时已显不足。本研究提出一种新型的高级跨层分布式入侵检测模型（ACLD-IDM），该模型融合联邦学习与基于注意力机制的深度学习方法，实现了实时、隐私保护且协同的威胁检测。所提出的模型引入了一种跨层特征融合策略，能够关联物理层、网络层和应用层之间的流量数据，从而发现传统单层系统常被忽略的隐藏攻击模式。ACLD-IDM采用混合人工智能（AI）技术，包括循环神经网络（RNN）、长短期记忆网络（LSTM）、图神经网络（GNN）以及Transformer架构，显著提升了在异构且资源受限环境中的检测精度、可扩展性与抗干扰能力。在NSL-KDD、CICIDS2017和UNSW-NB15等基准数据集上的评估结果表明，该模型在应对零日攻击和多向量攻击方面表现出卓越的适应性，同时通过去中心化的联邦学习有效保障了隐私安全。本研究的创新之处在于将跨层分析、去中心化智能与基于注意力的自适应学习相结合，为下一代智能、自维持的网络安全框架奠定了坚实基础，使其能够有效防御复杂数字基础设施面临的新兴威胁。
